To address this gap, the present study investigates the distribution and evolution of aspect-level sentiments and examines their correlation with the number of review rounds. We begin by segmenting the multi-round review comments of 11,063 accepted papers from Nature Communications and identifying fine-grained review aspect clusters. A manually annotated corpus of approximately 5,000 review sentences is then constructed. Using this dataset, we train a series of deep learning-based aspect sentiment classification models. Among them, the LCF-BERT-CDM model achieves the best performance, with a Macro-F1 score of 82.65%. Subsequent statistical analysis reveals a consistent trend: as the number of review rounds increases, the proportion of positive sentiments rises, while negative sentiments decline. Correlation analysis further indicates that aspect sentiment scores are negatively associated with the total number of review rounds. Key aspects exhibiting stronger correlations include "experiments", "research significance" and "result analysis".
title: Aspect-Based Sentiment Evolution and its Correlation with Review Rounds in Multi-Round Peer Reviews: A Deep Learning Approach
title_translated: 基于方面的情感演化及其与多轮同行评审中评审轮次的相关性：一种深度学习方法
summary_translated: 从同行评审评论的文本内容中挖掘情感信息，为科学评估过程提供了有价值的见解。然而，以往的研究往往受限于粗粒度分析以及对不同评审轮次缺乏区分。值得注意的是，评审者在多个评审阶段中关注点和情感倾向的动态变化仍鲜有研究。为弥补这一空白，本研究探讨了方面级情感的分布与演化，并分析其与评审轮次数目的相关性。我们首先对来自《自然·通讯》的11,063篇已接受论文的多轮评审评论进行分段，并识别出细粒度的评审方面聚类。随后构建了一个约5,000条评审句子的手动标注语料库。利用该数据集，我们训练了一系列基于深度学习的方面情感分类模型。其中，LCF-BERT-CDM模型表现最佳，宏平均F1得分为82.65%。后续统计分析揭示了一致趋势：随着评审轮次增加，正面情感比例上升，负面情感下降。相关性分析进一步表明，方面情感得分与总评审轮次呈负相关。相关性较强的方面包括“实验”、“研究意义”和“结果分析”。

summary: Reliable structural health monitoring (SHM) of offshore wind turbine (OWT) support structures requires fast state estimation from sparse measurements. Repeated high fidelity finite element or aeroelastic analyses are difficult to use directly in online monitoring loops, while purely data-driven surrogates can require large training sets. This paper presents Digi Turbine, a synthetic reliability-aware Physics Informed Neural Network (PINN) benchmark for OWT monopile support structure monitoring. The workflow embeds a simplified Euler Bernoulli beam equation with Winkler soil foundation in the training objective, couples it with Bayesian-prior-informed inverse identification, and adds First Order Reliability Method (FORM) screening. All validation uses synthetic configurations with analytical or finite-difference ground truth motivated by the NREL 5MW reference turbine context.
title: A Synthetic Reliability-Aware PINN Benchmark for Offshore Wind Turbine Support-Structure Monitoring with Bayesian Inverse Identification
title_translated: 面向海上风电支撑结构监测的合成可靠性感知PINN基准：基于贝叶斯逆识别方法
summary_translated: 可靠的海上风电（OWT）支撑结构健康监测（SHM）需要从稀疏测量中快速进行状态估计。重复进行高保真有限元或气动弹性分析难以直接用于在线监测回路，而纯数据驱动的代理模型又可能需要大量训练数据。本文提出Digi Turbine，一个面向OWT单桩支撑结构监测的合成可靠性感知物理信息神经网络（PINN）基准。该工作流程将简化的欧拉-伯努利梁方程与Winkler地基模型嵌入训练目标，结合贝叶斯先验引导的逆识别方法，并引入一阶可靠性方法（FORM）筛选机制。所有验证均采用基于NREL 5MW参考风力机背景的合成配置，其真实值通过解析解或有限差分法获得。

summary: More than a billion people communicate in Indic languages, yet the natural language processing infrastructure serving them remains fragmented and underdeveloped. The cause is structural: the field organizes its tools and benchmarks around individual languages or small subsets of genealogical language families, building separate analyzers, parsers, and datasets for each language and starting over for the next. This overlooks a deep regularity. Through more than two millennia of convergence around Sanskrit, Indic languages came to share a morphosyntactic architecture formalized in Pānini's grammar, the Astādhyāyī. This cuts across genealogical lines, uniting languages through a common framework. We argue that this Pāninian framework supplies a unifying computational architecture the field has lacked, and that benchmarks grounded explicitly in it would make Indic language systems more accurate, more data-efficient, and more transferable, effectively merging many apparently disparate and sparse Indic language resources into a single high-resource metalanguage bedrock. We propose a four-part benchmark suite to render this shared architecture explicit, measurable, and ready to be leveraged for practical applications. Moreover, we underscore the question it raises for interpretability research: whether neural models trained on these languages come to represent Pānini's categories on their own.
title: A Pāninian Foundation for Indic Language Processing
title_translated: 印地语语言处理的巴尼尼基础
summary_translated: 超过十亿人使用印地语语言，但服务于这些语言的自然语言处理基础设施仍处于碎片化且发展不足的状态。其根源在于结构性问题：该领域围绕个别语言或语系小分支组织工具与基准，为每种语言分别构建分析器、解析器和数据集，每次新语言都需重新开始。这忽略了深层规律：经过两千多年的以梵语为中心的融合，印地语语言共享一种由巴尼尼语法《阿闼婆吠陀》形式化的形态句法架构。这一架构超越了谱系界限，通过共同框架统一了多种语言。我们认为，这一巴尼尼框架为该领域提供了缺失的统一计算架构，基于此构建的基准将使印地语系统更准确、更高效利用数据，并具备更强的迁移能力，从而有效将众多看似分散且稀疏的印地语资源整合为单一高资源的元语言基础。我们提出一个四部分基准套件，以显式呈现这一共享架构，使其可度量并可用于实际应用。此外，我们强调这一框架对可解释性研究提出的根本问题：在这些语言上训练的神经模型是否会自发地表征巴尼尼的范畴？

summary: Foundation models have been increasingly applied to behavioral science domains such as psychology, sociology, and economics. While these models show promise in individual tasks such as survey response prediction and human-subject experiment simulation, there remains no systematic understanding of how well they perform across diverse behavioral science tasks, contexts, and populations. We introduce BehaviorBench, a comprehensive benchmark that evaluates foundation models along four core capabilities: (1) behavior prediction and simulation, (2) strategic decision-making, (3) subject-trait inference, and (4) behavioral knowledge application. Crucially, BehaviorBench evaluates model outputs at both the individual and distributional levels, capturing not only per-subject accuracy but also population-level alignment, an essential requirement for behavioral validity. Leveraging the tasks in BehaviorBench, we further develop Be.FM-1.5, extending the Be.FM family of behavioral foundation models fine-tuned on behavioral data. Our results reveal a considerable gap: proprietary general-purpose models excel at individual-level prediction and knowledge-intensive tasks, whereas behavioral foundation models, fine-tuned on behavioral data, achieve substantially stronger distributional alignment. Notably, Be.FM-1.5 leads on distributional metrics and remains competitive on individual-level metrics, suggesting that proper behavioral adaptation can close the gap. Our results highlight the importance of distributional evaluation, establish BehaviorBench as a foundation for developing and assessing behaviorally aligned AI systems, and demonstrate Be.FM-1.5's potential for a broad range of behavioral science studies. Our BehaviorBench and Be.FM-1.5 models can be accessed via https://umich-foreseer.github.io/behaviorbench/.
title: BehaviorBench: Benchmarking Foundation Models for Behavioral Science Tasks
title_translated: BehaviorBench：面向行为科学任务的基础模型基准测试
summary_translated: 基础模型在心理学、社会学和经济学等行为科学领域中的应用日益广泛。尽管这些模型在诸如问卷响应预测和人类受试者实验模拟等单项任务中展现出潜力，但目前尚缺乏对它们在多样化行为科学任务、情境和人群中的整体性能的系统理解。我们提出了BehaviorBench，一个全面的基准，用于评估基础模型在四个核心能力上的表现：(1) 行为预测与模拟，(2) 战略决策，(3) 受试者特质推断，(4) 行为知识应用。关键的是，BehaviorBench在个体和分布两个层面评估模型输出，不仅捕捉个体准确性，还衡量群体层面的一致性，这是行为有效性的重要要求。基于BehaviorBench的任务，我们进一步开发了Be.FM-1.5，扩展了在行为数据上微调的Be.FM系列行为基础模型。我们的结果揭示了显著差距：专有通用模型在个体层面预测和知识密集型任务上表现优异，而专门针对行为数据微调的行为基础模型则在分布一致性方面显著更强。值得注意的是，Be.FM-1.5在分布指标上领先，同时在个体指标上保持竞争力，表明恰当的行为适应可以弥合差距。我们的研究强调了分布评估的重要性，确立BehaviorBench作为开发和评估行为对齐AI系统的基石，并展示了Be.FM-1.5在广泛行为科学研究中的潜力。BehaviorBench和Be.FM-1.5模型可通过 https://umich-foreseer.github.io/behaviorbench/ 获取。

summary: Existing medical AI benchmarks lack process visibility, atomic skill evaluation, and integrated hallucination detection. We introduce MedBench v5, a redesigned benchmark for clinical multimodal models (language, vision-language, and agent systems) that moves from static QA to dynamic, process-oriented evaluation. MedBench v5 features: (1) a dual-dimensional framework combining Clinical Cognitive Responsiveness (14 sub-dimensions) and Medical Atomic Skills (4 agent environments), covering 63 tasks; (2) three switchable information-flow stressors (omission, contradiction, evidence delay) for factorized degradation analysis; (3) a dynamic process audit protocol with five reasoning nodes that produces model-specific failure fingerprints; (4) hallucination propagation monitoring across initiation, propagation, anchoring, and contradiction interaction-capturing silent hallucination. Experiments on frontier models show that strong overall task performance does not guarantee process stability: stressors mainly disrupt contradiction detection, diagnosis updating, hallucination propagation, and contradiction-based self-correction, while final evidence grounding can remain superficially stable. MedBench v5 provides a unified infrastructure for capability profiling, controllable stress testing, process auditing, and hallucination trajectory analysis in clinical AI evaluation.
title: MedBench v5: A Dynamic, Process-Oriented, and Hallucination-Aware Benchmark for Clinical Multimodal Models
title_translated: MedBench v5：面向临床多模态模型的动态、过程导向且具备幻觉感知的基准测试
summary_translated: 现有的医疗AI基准测试缺乏过程可见性、原子技能评估以及集成的幻觉检测能力。我们推出了MedBench v5，一个重新设计的临床多模态模型（语言、视觉-语言及智能体系统）基准，从静态问答转向动态、过程导向的评估。MedBench v5具有以下特点：(1) 双维框架，结合临床认知响应性（14个子维度）和医学原子技能（4个智能体环境），涵盖63项任务；(2) 三种可切换的信息流压力因素（遗漏、矛盾、证据延迟），用于因子化退化分析；(3) 动态过程审计协议，包含五个推理节点，生成模型特有的失败指纹；(4) 幻觉传播监控，覆盖启动、传播、锚定和矛盾交互，捕捉沉默幻觉。对前沿模型的实验表明，强大的整体任务表现并不保证过程稳定性：压力因素主要破坏矛盾检测、诊断更新、幻觉传播及基于矛盾的自我修正，而最终证据锚定可能仍表现为表面稳定。MedBench v5为能力画像、可控压力测试、过程审计和幻觉轨迹分析提供了统一基础设施，用于临床AI评估。

summary: Self-evolving agents improve over time by distilling experience from past executions and reusing it in future tasks. Existing systems represent such experience either as natural-language text injected into the agent context or as code exposed as callable tools. However, the choice between these representations is typically made at design time rather than derived from the characteristics of the experience itself, leaving the trade-offs between them poorly understood. We present the first controlled study that isolates text memory and code memory over an identical set of experiences. Our results show that the two forms exhibit complementary trade-offs in construction cost, execution efficiency, and transferability, such that neither representation alone is sufficient. Guided by these findings, we propose Metis, a self-evolving agent system built on a hierarchical dual-representation memory. Metis organizes textual experience into execution plans, environment facts, and common pitfalls, and selectively crystallizes recurring plans into validated callable tools. This design combines the broad applicability of text memory with the execution efficiency of code memory while incurring tool-generation cost only when justified by repeated reuse. We evaluate Metis on AppWorld, a challenging benchmark for interactive agents. The results show that Metis improves task accuracy by up to 20.6% over ReAct while reducing execution cost by up to 22.8%. Compared with representative self-evolving agent systems, Metis consistently achieves a better balance between accuracy, execution efficiency, and memory-construction cost.
title: Metis: Bridging Text and Code Memory for Self-Evolving Agents
title_translated: Metis：连接文本与代码记忆的自演化智能体
summary_translated: 自演化智能体通过提炼过往执行的经验并在未来任务中复用，实现持续改进。现有系统将此类经验表示为注入智能体上下文的自然语言文本或作为可调用工具暴露的代码。然而，这种表示形式的选择通常在设计阶段确定，而非基于经验本身的特性，导致两者之间的权衡关系理解不足。我们首次进行了受控研究，对同一组经验分别考察文本记忆和代码记忆的表现。结果表明，这两种形式在构建成本、执行效率和可迁移性方面存在互补性权衡，单独使用任一形式均不充分。基于这些发现，我们提出Metis，一种基于分层双表示记忆的自演化智能体系统。Metis将文本经验组织为执行计划、环境事实和常见陷阱，并选择性地将重复出现的计划结晶为经过验证的可调用工具。该设计结合了文本记忆的广泛适用性与代码记忆的执行高效性，仅在重复使用得到证明时才产生工具生成成本。我们在AppWorld这一交互式智能体的挑战性基准上评估Metis，结果显示其任务准确率相比ReAct最高提升20.6%，同时执行成本降低最多达22.8%。相较于代表性自演化智能体系统，Metis始终在准确率、执行效率与记忆构建成本之间取得更优平衡。

summary: Most electronic health record (EHR) foundation models encode clinical events as discrete event tokens from a fixed vocabulary and therefore cannot directly represent events containing unseen concepts or new combinations of concepts and attributes such as numeric values. This limits transfer across institutions and even across deployment pipelines within the same institution. We introduce PORTER, a language-grounded structured EHR foundation model that decouples event representation from this fixed vocabulary. PORTER represents events through their descriptions using a frozen text encoder, integrates numeric values through a dedicated pathway, and learns clinical dynamics over patient timelines with an autoregressively pretrained temporal backbone. Across 74 clinical prediction tasks at a pediatric hospital, PORTER matched the mean AUROC of a fixed-vocabulary model with the same temporal backbone and pretraining objective. When the same patient timelines were rendered using event descriptions not seen during pretraining, PORTER transferred without retraining or vocabulary mapping, recovering 97.1% of the mean AUROC of a model trained directly on the target vocabulary. When transferred to MIMIC, PORTER outperformed the fixed-vocabulary model, which dropped 69% of events because their tokens were unseen. Mechanistic analyses showed cross-vocabulary transfer tracked preservation of patient-level representation geometry rather than the scale of the text encoder, and the numeric pathway improved sensitivity to magnitude without disrupting clinical concept identity. PORTER also achieved higher AUROC than a task-specific text serialization comparator, at 329-fold lower amortized compute. PORTER is a step toward vocabulary-independent EHR foundation models that reduce the need for vocabulary harmonization while preserving in-domain performance and enabling efficient cross-task reuse.
title: PORTER: Language-Grounded Event Representations for Portable Structured EHR Foundation Models
title_translated: PORTER：面向可移植结构化电子健康记录基础模型的语言锚定事件表示
summary_translated: 大多数电子健康记录（EHR）基础模型将临床事件编码为固定词汇表中的离散事件标记，因此无法直接表示包含未见概念或新概念组合（如数值）的事件。这限制了跨机构甚至同一机构内不同部署流程间的迁移能力。我们引入PORTER，一种语言锚定的结构化EHR基础模型，将事件表示与固定词汇表解耦。PORTER通过冻结的文本编码器表示事件描述，通过专用路径整合数值信息，并利用自回归预训练的时间骨干网络学习患者时间线上的临床动态。在一家儿科医院的74项临床预测任务中，PORTER在相同时间骨干和预训练目标下达到了与固定词汇表模型相当的平均AUROC。当使用预训练期间未见过的事件描述渲染相同患者时间线时，PORTER无需重新训练或词汇映射即可实现迁移，恢复了97.1%的目标词汇表模型平均AUROC。在迁移到MIMIC数据集时，PORTER表现优于固定词汇表模型，后者因大量事件标记未见而丢失了69%的事件。机制分析显示，跨词汇表迁移与患者层面表示几何结构的保留相关，而非文本编码器规模；数值路径提升了对量级的敏感性，且不破坏临床概念身份。PORTER在329倍更低的摊销计算成本下，仍实现了高于特定任务文本序列化对比模型的AUROC。PORTER是迈向无词汇依赖EHR基础模型的重要一步，可在减少词汇标准化需求的同时保持域内性能，并支持高效的跨任务复用。

summary: We ask whether the geographic origin of Tang-dynasty poets leaves a detectable linguistic trace in their work. Aggregating every poem attributed to each author in the Complete Tang Poems (Quan Tang Shi) and linking poets to their administrative circuit of origin via the China Biographical Database (CBDB), we build a poet-level corpus of 357 poets across the ten Tang circuits and frame origin prediction as multi-class classification. Using character $n$-gram TF-IDF together with interpretable domain features (imagery, season, and allusion), classical and neural models predict a poet's broad region (South vs.\ North) at $0.69$ accuracy, well above the $0.53$ majority baseline, and finer circuit-level origin above chance. Beyond classification, three findings emerge. (i) Linguistic distance between circuits grows with geographic distance (Mantel $r=0.40$, $p\approx0.09$ over nine circuits), evidence of a distance-decay effect in poetic language. (ii) The signal interacts with time: South/North separability is at chance in the High Tang and strongest in the Late Tang, consistent with court-driven homogenization at the empire's height followed by regional divergence. (iii) The model's confident errors are historically meaningful -- in the Early Tang, every misclassification is a southern poet read as northern, reflecting the prestige of the northern court idiom. We further show that, when given the whole corpus through a hierarchical frozen-encoder representation, a classical-Chinese transformer (GuwenBERT) only matches -- not beats -- simple TF-IDF, and that combining them adds nothing, indicating that character $n$-grams already capture the regional signal. Our results position interpretable machine learning as a hypothesis generator for literary history.
title: Predicting Poets' Origins from Verse: A Computational Analysis of Regional Linguistic Fingerprints in the Complete Tang Poems
title_translated: 从诗作预测诗人出身：对《全唐诗》中区域语言指纹的计算分析
summary_translated: 我们探讨唐代诗人地理出身是否在其作品中留下可检测的语言痕迹。通过对《全唐诗》中每位作者的所有诗作进行聚合，并通过中国人物传记数据库（CBDB）将诗人与其所属行政道区关联，我们构建了一个涵盖357位诗人的诗人级语料库，并将出身预测建模为多分类问题。采用字符n-gram TF-IDF结合可解释领域特征（意象、季节、典故），经典与神经网络模型在区分诗人南北大区（南 vs. 北）的分类准确率达0.69，显著高于0.53的多数基线，且在更精细的道级出身预测上也高于随机水平。除分类外，三个发现浮现：(i) 各道间语言距离随地理距离增加而增大（Mantel r=0.40, p≈0.09，覆盖九个道），表明诗歌语言存在距离衰减效应；(ii) 信号随时间演变：盛唐时期南北差异接近随机，晚唐最强，符合帝国鼎盛期由朝廷推动的语言同质化，随后区域分化；(iii) 模型自信错误具有历史意义——早期唐诗中所有误判均为南方诗人被误判为北方，反映出北方宫廷语体的声望。此外，我们还发现，当整个语料库通过分层冻结编码器表示输入时，经典中文Transformer（GuwenBERT）仅能匹配而非超越简单的TF-IDF，二者结合亦无增益，表明字符n-gram已充分捕捉区域语言信号。本研究将可解释机器学习定位为文学史研究的假设生成工具。

summary: "Talk short. Drop grammar. Save token." This caveman style is widely promoted as a way to cut inference cost, but whether it actually saves anything depends on which channel (the user's prompt or the model's response) is being compressed. We present Cavewoman, a two-channel evaluation protocol that scores every generation on task accuracy, realized per-item cost, and reference-text agreement against the model's unconstrained reference. We evaluate eight models on five datasets at five reduction levels, with both channels measured on the same items. Output compression cuts realized cost on most API models (1.4-2.4x per model, up to 3x in the best case) and on all four open-weight models under public-tier pricing. Input compression has the opposite effect, a strict lose-lose: it raises net cost rather than lowering it (~1.15x on the five-benchmark mean, up to 1.8x on the worst dataset and 2.7x under stronger compression), because models compensate with longer responses even as accuracy collapses. Under the same setting, surface text diverges from the unconstrained reference: on the non-reasoning models, roughly half of all generations are correct yet their surface text no longer entails the model's own unconstrained baseline generation. The divergence survives length-controlled re-scoring, multiple-comparisons correction, and replication under complementary semantic measures. Code and data are available at https://github.com/danielle34/cavewoman.
title: CAVEWOMAN: How Large Language Models Behave Under Linguistic Input and Output Compression
title_translated: CAVEWOMAN：大型语言模型在语言输入与输出压缩下的行为研究
summary_translated: “说话简短。省略语法。节省token。”这种原始人风格被广泛提倡以降低推理成本，但其实际节俭效果取决于压缩的是用户提示还是模型响应。我们提出Cavewoman，一种双通道评估协议，对每次生成同时评分任务准确率、实际单位成本及与模型无约束参考文本的一致性。我们在五种数据集上对八种模型在五个压缩级别下进行评估，且两个通道在同一项目上测量。输出压缩在多数API模型上显著降低了实际成本（每模型1.4–2.4倍，最佳情况达3倍），并在所有四种开源权重模型于公共定价模式下均有效。输入压缩则效果相反，属于严格得不偿失：它反而增加了净成本（五基准平均约1.15倍，最差数据集达1.8倍，更强压缩下高达2.7倍），因为模型虽在缩短提示，却以更长响应补偿，同时准确率急剧下降。在相同设置下，表面文本与无约束参考发生显著偏离：在非推理类模型中，约一半生成内容正确，但其表面文本已不再蕴含模型自身无约束基线生成的内容。这种偏差在长度控制重评、多重比较校正及互补语义度量下仍持续存在。代码与数据已公开于https://github.com/danielle34/cavewoman。

summary: Contextual entrainment, which is a newly discovered phenomenon in large language models (LLMs), refers to the tendency of a model to assign higher probabilities to tokens that appear in its context. In this work, we extend this phenomenon from the token level to the sentence level by examining the per-token mean log-probability of a sentence instead of the probabilities of individual tokens. We investigate sentence-level contextual entrainment across 26 LLMs from seven families and two datasets, which cover both subjective and objective tasks. We find that sentence-level contextual entrainment exists. This means that the sentences in the prompt (even if they are counterfactual statements) can significantly increase their probability during model inference time. As the model size increases, contextual entrainment gradually decreases. We also find that contextual entrainment is controlled by 2% to 4% of the attention heads. Turning off these attention heads can effectively mitigate contextual entrainment without hurting the model's performance.
title: Sentence-Level Contextual Entrainment in Large Language Models
title_translated: 大型语言模型中的句子级上下文同化现象
summary_translated: 上下文同化是一种在大型语言模型（LLMs）中新近发现的现象，指模型倾向于为其上下文中的词元分配更高的概率。本文将此现象从词元层面扩展至句子层面，通过考察句子的每个词元的平均对数概率，而非单个词元的概率。我们在来自七个模型家族的26个LLM及两个数据集上研究句子级上下文同化，涵盖主观与客观任务。结果表明，句子级上下文同化确实存在：即使提示中的句子为反事实陈述，也能在模型推理过程中显著提高其概率。随着模型规模增大，上下文同化现象逐渐减弱。我们还发现，上下文同化由2%至4%的注意力头所控制。关闭这些注意力头可有效缓解上下文同化，且不会损害模型性能。

summary: Modern spoken language understanding (SLU) systems are increasingly deployed in real-world settings, where specific functionalities may need to be removed due to policy or safety constraints. In SLU, a functionality corresponds to an intent and its associated slot-generation behavior. However, in autoregressive models, suppressing a target intent does not eliminate the conditional mapping that generates slots conditioned on that intent. When the intent prefix is externally supplied, the model can reconstruct the original intent-slot structure. We identify this structural failure as \textbf{\emph{capability persistence}}. We propose \textit{\underline{B}inding \underline{S}ubspace (BSU)}, a representation-level framework that isolates and attenuates intent-conditioned directions underlying this mapping. Across SLU benchmarks, BSU substantially reduces forced-prefix recoverability while preserving retained performance.
title: Selective Capability Unlearning in End-to-End Spoken Language Understanding
title_translated: 端到端语音语言理解中的选择性能力遗忘
summary_translated: 现代语音语言理解（SLU）系统越来越多地部署在真实场景中，由于政策或安全限制，某些功能可能需要被移除。在SLU中，一个功能对应一个意图及其相关的槽位生成行为。然而，在自回归模型中，抑制目标意图并不能消除生成与该意图相关的槽位的条件映射。当意图前缀由外部提供时，模型可以重建原始的意图-槽位结构。我们识别出这种结构性失败为“能力持续性”。我们提出了BSU（绑定子空间）框架，这是一种表示层面的方法，能够隔离并减弱该映射背后的意图条件方向。在多个SLU基准测试中，BSU显著降低了强制前缀恢复的可能性，同时保持了保留性能。

summary: Sentiment analysis in Twitter datasets is important because it enables monitoring public opinion on products and analysis of political and social movements. One critical step is preprocessing: the automated processing of text for machine learning algorithms. Preprocessing plays a critical role in reducing noise and improving efficiency. However, little research has systematically examined the order in which preprocessing techniques are implemented. We find that, when accounting for order, spelling correction is the least impactful preprocessing technique, whereas tokenisation is the most impactful. Stemming and stop-word removal are interchangeable, and it is better to remove stop words without removing negation. The best order for applying the preprocessing techniques was tokenisation, text cleaning, stemming, and then stopword removal. Our results provide a systematic approach for practitioners to deploy preprocessing to improve model output without the costly preprocessing exploratory phase.
title: Best Preprocessing Techniques for Sentiment Analysis
title_translated: 情感分析的最佳预处理技术
summary_translated: 在Twitter数据集上进行情感分析非常重要，因为它能够监测公众对产品意见以及分析政治和社会运动。一个关键步骤是预处理：对文本进行自动化处理以适应机器学习算法。预处理在减少噪声和提高效率方面起着至关重要的作用。然而，很少有研究系统地探讨预处理技术的执行顺序。我们发现，在考虑顺序的情况下，拼写纠正的预处理技术影响最小，而分词的影响最大。词干提取和停用词去除可互换，且最好在不删除否定词的情况下去除停用词。最佳的预处理技术应用顺序为：分词、文本清洗、词干提取，最后是停用词去除。我们的结果为从业者提供了一种系统化的方法，可在无需昂贵的预处理探索阶段的情况下提升模型输出质量。

summary: MeMo proposes language models with explicit multi-layer correlation matrix memories (CMMs), where memorization, retrieval, and forgetting are architectural operations. This paper asks how such memories can reduce the need for retraining when knowledge changes. For changes expressible as MeMo memory associations, the model's accessible knowledge can be updated by editing explicit memories rather than retraining the whole model. We propose a version-aware operation layer in which high-level operations such as replace, obsolete, keep-history, rollback, and trace are compiled into MeMo-native primitive calls over sequences and tokens. The key observation is that a version-aware operation is rarely a single MeMo association. It is an ordered transaction of primitive edits, for example forgetting one sequence-token chain, memorizing another, preserving a historical chain, and recording an inverse program. The framework introduces two auxiliary CMMs: a Version CMM (V-CMM) for mapping version transitions to transaction handles, and a Transaction CMM (T-CMM) for storing reusable change contents and inverse programs. It supports both direct sequence-level edits and structured diff-level inputs, and outlines an evaluation route for update success, rollback, traceability, locality, and transaction reuse.
title: Towards Version-aware Operations and Transaction Memories for Multi-layer MeMo
comment: Accepted by MeMo Workshop on Mechanistic Interpretability & Neuro-symbolic Approaches by-design, Rome (Italy), 24/6/2026
title_translated: 面向多层MeMo的版本感知操作与事务记忆
summary_translated: MeMo提出具有显式多层相关矩阵记忆（CMMs）的语言模型，其中记忆、检索和遗忘都是架构级操作。本文探讨此类记忆如何在知识发生变化时减少重新训练的需求。对于可表达为MeMo记忆关联的知识变更，模型的可访问知识可以通过编辑显式记忆而非重新训练整个模型来更新。我们提出一个版本感知操作层，将诸如替换、过时、保留历史、回滚和追踪等高层操作编译为针对序列和标记的MeMo原生基本调用。关键观察是，版本感知操作很少是单一的MeMo关联，而是一系列有序的原始编辑操作，例如遗忘一条序列-标记链、记忆另一条链、保留历史链，并记录逆向程序。该框架引入两个辅助CMM：版本CMM（V-CMM）用于将版本转换映射到事务句柄，事务CMM（T-CMM）用于存储可重用的变更内容和逆向程序。它支持直接序列级编辑和结构化差异级输入，并规划了评估更新成功率、回滚、可追溯性、局部性和事务重用的路径。

summary: Steering a large language model (LLM) toward a desired behavior typically relies on an iterative process of hand-crafting a prompt based on a careful inspection of the model's responses. This is an involved, brittle, and error-prone process. Preference-based fine-tuning is a more rigorous but often prohibitively expensive solution. We propose spec learning, a framework that relies on a brief user instruction and a small set of preference judgments. These are compiled into specifications in the form of natural-language prompts for an LLM. Specifications condition LLMs at inference time, and no parameter updates to the underlying models are required. We show that the responses generated based on the compiled specifications often outperform direct preference optimization (DPO) on datasets from specialized domains whose preference signal is dense. Unlike opaque weight updates, the resulting specifications are human-readable and double as interpretable and transparent written embodiments of the preference signal that produced them.
title: Towards Spec Learning: Inference-Time Alignment from Preference Pairs
title_translated: 迈向规范学习：基于偏好对的推理时对齐
summary_translated: 引导大型语言模型（LLM）朝期望行为发展通常依赖于反复手工设计提示词的过程，这需要仔细检查模型的响应。这一过程复杂、脆弱且容易出错。基于偏好的微调虽然更严谨，但往往成本过高。我们提出规范学习（spec learning）框架，该框架仅需简短的用户指令和少量偏好判断。这些信息被编译为自然语言提示形式的规范，用于在推理时约束LLM，且无需对底层模型进行参数更新。我们证明，基于编译规范生成的响应在偏好信号密集的特定领域数据集上，通常优于直接偏好优化（DPO）。与不透明的权重更新不同，生成的规范具有可读性，既是人类可理解的解释，也是产生它们的偏好信号的透明书面体现。

summary: Clinical value sets define the standardized terminology codes used in quality measurement, phenotyping, cohort construction, and clinical decision support. The recently introduced Retrieval-Augmented Set Completion (RASC) benchmark showed that direct zero-shot large language model (LLM) generation is poorly suited to this task: clinical code systems are large, version-controlled, and not reliably memorized by language models. We study a stage-wise alternative in which candidate-pool construction is optimized for recall and a constrained LLM adjudicator is optimized for candidate selection. On the full 3,744-value-set RASC test split, Qwen3-based retrieval with vocabulary-aware expansion and code-display rescue retrieval increases candidate-pool recall from the original RASC retrieval baseline of 0.553 to 0.730; on the held-out-publisher stratum, pool recall is 0.655. The higher-recall pool alone is not sufficient: applying the original SAPBert cross-encoder to this expanded pool gives full-test macro F1 of 0.287 and held-out-publisher macro F1 of 0.233. Replacing the stage-2 selector with blinded GPT-5 adjudication over the same pool increases full-test macro F1 to 0.549 and held-out-publisher macro F1 to 0.533. These results show that retrieval-constrained LLM adjudication can substantially improve value set completion while preserving the safety constraint that all returned codes must come from an auditable candidate pool.
title: RASC+: Retrieval-Constrained LLM Adjudication for Clinical Value Set Authoring
title_translated: RASC+：用于临床价值集编写的检索约束型LLM仲裁
summary_translated: 临床价值集定义了在质量测量、表型分析、队列构建和临床决策支持中使用的标准化术语代码。最近提出的检索增强型集合补全（RASC）基准表明，直接零样本大语言模型（LLM）生成并不适合此任务：临床代码系统规模庞大、版本受控，且语言模型无法可靠记忆。我们研究了一种分阶段替代方案，其中候选池构建优化召回率，而受限的LLM仲裁者则优化候选选择。在完整的3,744个值集RASC测试集上，基于Qwen3的词汇感知扩展和代码显示恢复检索将候选池召回率从原始RASC检索基线的0.553提升至0.730；在保留发布者子集上，召回率为0.655。更高的召回率仍不足以保证效果：使用原始SAPBert交叉编码器处理该扩展池，全测试集宏F1为0.287，保留发布者子集宏F1为0.233。将第二阶段选择器替换为盲视GPT-5仲裁者后，全测试集宏F1提升至0.549，保留发布者子集宏F1提升至0.533。这些结果表明，检索约束型LLM仲裁可显著提升价值集补全效果，同时保持所有返回代码必须来自可审计候选池的安全约束。

summary: End-to-end large language models (LLMs) produce fluent multi-document summaries but remain prone to hallucination, and the attributions they offer are typically coarse (whole documents or passages) and generated post hoc, leaving each summary statement hard to verify. We revisit the modular Extract--Select--Rewrite paradigm and recast its intermediate representation as the unit of attribution. We present CAMS, a Claim-Anchored Multi-document Summarization framework that (i) extracts atomic claims with token-level provenance from every source document, (ii) clusters equivalent claims across documents while flagging inter-source conflicts, (iii) selects a support-aware and salient subset, and (iv) rewrites the selection into a summary in which every sentence is anchored to a support-checked claim that links back to one or more source spans. Because content is localized before it is realized, the pipeline is attribution-oriented by construction and faithfulness-oriented by construction: it structurally preserves fine-grained, multi-source traceability while using support-aware selection, constrained rewriting, and verification to encourage, rather than guarantee, factual faithfulness. We evaluate quality, faithfulness, and localization on MultiNews, analyze conflict handling on DiverseSumm, and test zero-shot transfer on WCEP, using a two-regime protocol that separates reference-free citation quality from gold-aligned localization accuracy, and we add an evaluator-decoupled audit that tests citation precision with a support model never used for selection or verification. CAMS matches strong end-to-end and span-attribution baselines on summary quality while substantially improving faithfulness and citation precision, lifting multi-source attribution accuracy by roughly two-thirds, and exposing a controllable faithfulness--coverage trade-off that end-to-end models leave implicit.
title: Faithful by Construction: Claim-Anchored Attribution for Multi-Document Summarization
title_translated: 基于构建的忠实性：用于多文档摘要的主张锚定归因
summary_translated: 端到端的大语言模型（LLMs）生成流畅的多文档摘要，但仍易产生幻觉，且其提供的归因通常粗略（整篇文档或段落），为事后生成，导致每个摘要陈述难以验证。我们重新审视模块化的提取-选择-重写范式，并将中间表示作为归因单位。我们提出了CAMS框架——一种主张锚定的多文档摘要方法，该方法（i）从每份源文档中提取具有词级来源的原子主张，（ii）在文档间聚类等价主张并标记跨源冲突，（iii）选择一个支持感知且显著的子集，（iv）将该选择重写为摘要，其中每个句子都锚定在一个经过验证的支持主张上，该主张可回溯至一个或多个源文本片段。由于内容在实现前已被定位，该流程在结构上具有归因导向和忠实性导向：它在结构上保持细粒度、多源可追溯性，同时通过支持感知选择、受限重写和验证来鼓励而非保证事实忠实性。我们在MultiNews上评估了质量、忠实性和定位性，在DiverseSumm上分析了冲突处理能力，并在WCEP上测试了零样本迁移效果，采用双模式协议，将无参考引用质量与黄金对齐的定位准确性分开；此外还引入了评估者解耦审计，使用从未用于选择或验证的支持模型测试引用精确率。CAMS在摘要质量上达到强端到端和跨度归因基线水平，同时显著提升忠实性和引用精确率，使多源归因准确率提高约三分之二，并揭示了端到端模型隐含的可控忠实性-覆盖率权衡。

summary: Because mathematics is highly abstract, a single statement can take very different forms depending on what subfield it is framed in. There are many examples where breakthroughs occurred after researchers discovered that a question had already been answered in a different field. At the same time, the growth of new resources related to formalization has increased the need for tools that enable efficient and reliable navigation between mathematical 'languages' (e.g., from Lean to natural language). In this paper, we investigate whether current embedding models capture mathematical equivalence. To do this, we introduce the Mathematically Equivalent but Lexically Different Pairs (MELD) Dataset, a collection of mathematically equivalent statements that are expressed in very different language. We show that current state-of-the-art embedding models tend to group statements by the terminology used to make them instead of the underlying math. Motivated by this, we propose a contrastive approach to learning embeddings of mathematical text that focuses on aligning informal statements with different formalizations. Our experiments demonstrate that this leads to improvements not only on informal-formal retrieval tasks but also on MELD, which only contains natural language statements.
title: Does My Embedding Reflect That $A = B$? Evaluating Mathematical Equivalence in Embedding Models
title_translated: 我的嵌入是否反映 $A = B$？嵌入模型中数学等价性的评估
summary_translated: 由于数学高度抽象，同一命题在不同子领域中可能呈现截然不同的形式。历史上多次重大突破源于研究者发现某个问题已在另一领域被解决。与此同时，形式化资源的增长增加了在数学‘语言’之间高效可靠导航的需求（例如从Lean到自然语言）。本文探讨当前嵌入模型是否能捕捉数学等价性。为此，我们引入了数学等价但词汇不同的配对数据集（MELD），包含以完全不同语言表达的数学等价命题。我们发现，当前最先进的嵌入模型倾向于根据表述术语对命题进行分组，而非依据其底层数学实质。受此启发，我们提出一种对比学习方法，专注于将非正式陈述与不同形式化版本对齐。实验表明，该方法不仅提升了非正式-形式化检索任务的表现，也在仅包含自然语言陈述的MELD数据集上取得改进。

summary: Self-supervised and supervised speech models are increasingly used to investigate which linguistic information their internal representations encode, and at what level of abstraction they encode it. One underexplored phenomenon is consonant cluster reduction (CCR) in African American English (AAE), a widespread phonological process and a source of automatic speech recognition (ASR) disparity. To examine how CCR is represented, we conduct speaker-independent layer-wise probing of wav2vec2-base and Whisper-small using two tasks: segmental reduction detection and segmental restoration of underlying cluster identity. Both models distinguish reduced and canonical forms with high accuracy. Crucially, reduced segments retain cues to their underlying stops, indicating that CCR is encoded as structured gradient phonological variation rather than simple segmental deletion. These results demonstrate structured phonological encoding of AAE CCR patterns in modern speech models.
title: Layer-wise Probing of wav2vec 2.0 and Whisper for Consonant Cluster Reduction in African American English
comment: This paper has been accepted for presentation at Interspeech 2026
title_translated: wav2vec 2.0 和 Whisper 在非洲裔美国英语辅音簇简化中的逐层探测
summary_translated: 自监督和监督语音模型越来越多地被用于探究其内部表征所编码的语言信息及其抽象层次。一个尚未充分探索的现象是非洲裔美国英语（AAE）中的辅音簇简化（CCR），这是一种广泛存在的音系过程，也是自动语音识别（ASR）差异的重要来源。为检验CCR的表征方式，我们对wav2vec2-base和Whisper-small进行了独立于说话人的逐层探测，采用两项任务：音段简化检测和潜在辅音簇身份的音段恢复。两个模型均以高精度区分简化形式与标准形式。关键的是，简化音段仍保留其潜在塞音的线索，表明CCR被编码为结构化的梯度音系变异，而非简单的音段删除。这些结果表明，现代语音模型中存在对AAE CCR模式的结构化音系编码。

summary: Tokenization is a foundational step in NLP pipelines, yet standard evaluation metrics such as fertility rate fail to capture morphological correctness for agglutinative languages. We present QuechuaTok, a systematic benchmark comparing four tokenization strategies - BPE, Unigram LM, WordPiece, and a morphology-aware PRPE tokenizer - for Southern Quechua (quz), a low-resource agglutinative language spoken by 8-10 million people in South America. Using a 200k-sentence corpus and the SQUOIA finite-state morphological analyzer (Rios, 2016) as silver standard, we evaluate three metrics: fertility rate, OOV rate, and morphological boundary accuracy (MorphAcc). Our results show that BPE achieves the lowest fertility rate (1.636 at 16k vocab) by memorizing surface word forms, while achieving only 6.67% MorphAcc. PRPE achieves 83.33% MorphAcc - the highest of all systems - demonstrating that fertility rate alone is insufficient to evaluate tokenizers for agglutinative languages. All code and models are publicly available at kaggle.com/code/macmaky/quechuatok
title: QuechuaTok: Morphological Boundary Accuracy as a Necessary Metric for Tokenizer Evaluation in Agglutinative Low-Resource Languages
comment: 4 pages, 3 tables, 1 figure. Code available at this http URL
title_translated: QuechuaTok：在黏着型低资源语言中，形态边界准确率是分词器评估的必要指标
summary_translated: 分词是NLP流水线的基础步骤，但标准评估指标如生育率无法捕捉黏着型语言的形态正确性。我们提出了QuechuaTok，一个系统性基准，用于比较四种分词策略——BPE、Unigram LM、WordPiece以及一种形态感知的PRPE分词器——在南克丘亚语（quz）上的表现，这是一种在南美洲有800万至1000万人使用的低资源黏着型语言。基于20万句语料库，并以SQUOIA有限状态形态分析器（Rios, 2016）作为银标准，我们评估了三个指标：生育率、未登录词率和形态边界准确率（MorphAcc）。结果显示，BPE在16k词表下实现了最低的生育率（1.636），但仅获得6.67%的MorphAcc；而PRPE达到了83.33%的MorphAcc，为所有系统中最高，表明仅凭生育率不足以评估黏着型语言的分词器。所有代码和模型均可在kaggle.com/code/macmaky/quechuatok公开获取。

summary: Exact-match retrieval recall is often used as a proxy for whether a retriever supplies useful policy context to a downstream decision model. We test this proxy for pre-action policy classification in tau-bench using Qwen2.5-3B/7B classifiers. Under gold-policy conditioning, a compact structured state improves macro-F1 over raw trajectories by 0.13-0.17 after tuning. We then replace the benchmark-designated policy clause with the top-ranked clause retrieved from decision-time context. Although the exact governing clause is retrieved at rank 1 for only 7% of airline states, the primary 3B classifier obtains macro-F1 0.58 with retrieved clauses versus 0.60 with gold clauses (Delta=-0.02, task-cluster 95% CI [-0.23,+0.21]); mismatched-policy and no-policy controls score 0.32 and 0.21. We do not detect a macro-F1 difference between retrieved and gold clauses in this configuration, although the interval remains too wide to establish non-inferiority. The same qualitative pattern appears with a second retriever and at 7B, while varying across fine-tuning configurations. These results indicate that exact-match clause recall can underestimate downstream policy utility in this benchmark setting, motivating evaluation with retrieved policies in the classification loop rather than recall alone.
title: When Retrieval Metrics Mislead: Measuring Policy Signal in Long-Horizon Tool-Use Agents
authors: Juan Pablo De la Cruz Weinstein
title_translated: 当检索指标误导时：长时程工具使用智能体中的策略信号测量
summary_translated: 精确匹配的检索召回率常被用作检索器是否向下游决策模型提供有用策略上下文的代理指标。我们在tau-bench中测试了Qwen2.5-3B/7B分类器在预动作策略分类中的这一代理。在黄金策略条件下，经过调优后，紧凑的结构化状态相比原始轨迹使宏F1提升0.13-0.17。随后，我们将基准指定的策略条款替换为决策时上下文中检索到的最高排名条款。尽管仅有7%的航空公司状态在第1位检索到精确的管辖条款，但主3B分类器使用检索条款时的宏F1为0.58，而使用黄金条款时为0.60（Δ=-0.02，任务簇95%置信区间[-0.23,+0.21]）；不匹配策略和无策略控制组得分分别为0.32和0.21。在此配置下，我们未检测到检索条款与黄金条款之间的宏F1差异，尽管区间过宽，无法确立非劣性。同样的定性模式在第二个检索器和7B模型中也出现，且在不同微调配置下有所变化。这些结果表明，在该基准设置中，精确匹配条款召回率可能低估下游策略效用，因此建议在分类循环中评估检索到的策略，而非仅依赖召回率。

summary: Practice often treats automatic metrics for attribution in LLM retrieval-augmented generation as interchangeable. We audit eight automatic scorers -- lexical, embedding, and BERTScore baselines alongside entailment/grounding-trained models (clean and FEVER NLI, the checker MiniCheck) -- across three evaluation constructs (provenance/topicality, generated-answer attribution, and fact-check entailment), asking whether any scorer transfers: stays within the 95% confidence interval of the best audited scorer on every dataset of a multi-dataset construct. In the construct with the most multi-dataset human-labeled coverage -- generated-answer attribution (AttributionBench's four source datasets, n = 1,610, with independent HAGRID, n = 2,150) -- none does: the per-dataset metric rankings invert (Kendall tau = -0.64, p = 0.031 on AttributedQA vs. LFQA), and an off-the-shelf NLI scorer that is best on short-claim AttributedQA (AUROC 0.90) collapses to AUROC 0.53 (chance) on long-form LFQA, where BERTScore wins (0.91); the flip is not a length or truncation artifact. This instability has a concrete decision cost: a naive "best-on-average" rule for choosing an evaluator fails leave-one-dataset-out (mean held-out regret 0.172 AUROC, worse than fixing one scorer), so metric choice must be validated on the target dataset rather than learned from others. A prompt-based LLM judge avoids the chance-level collapses the automatic scorers suffer (no LFQA collapse) but is not uniformly best, ~100x costlier, and non-deterministic -- relocating, not removing, the validation burden.
title: Do LLM Attribution Metrics Transfer? Auditing Retrieval-Augmented Generation Evaluation Across Datasets and Constructs
authors: Juan Pablo De la Cruz Weinstein
title_translated: 大语言模型归属度度量指标是否具有可迁移性？跨数据集和评估构念的检索增强生成评估审计
summary_translated: 实践中常将大语言模型检索增强生成中的自动归属度度量视为可互换。本文对八种自动评分器（词汇、嵌入、BERTScore基线，以及基于蕴含/事实验证训练的模型，包括干净版本和FEVER NLI，检查器MiniCheck）在三个评估构念（来源溯源/主题相关性、生成答案归属、事实核查蕴含关系）上进行了审计，探究是否存在评分器可迁移：即在多数据集构念的每个数据集上，其表现是否保持在最佳审计评分器95%置信区间的范围内。在覆盖最多多数据集人工标注的构念——生成答案归属（AttributionBench的四个源数据集，n=1,610，独立HAGRID，n=2,150）中，没有任何一个评分器满足该条件：各数据集上的评分排名发生反转（Kendall tau = -0.64，p = 0.031，对比AttributedQA与LFQA），且在短命题AttributedQA上表现最佳的现成NLI评分器（AUROC 0.90）在长篇幅LFQA上骤降至AUROC 0.53（随机水平），而BERTScore则胜出（0.91）；这种反转并非由长度或截断引起。这一不稳定性带来实际决策成本：采用“平均最优”规则选择评估器在留一数据集测试中失败（平均被排除后悔值0.172 AUROC，劣于固定单一评分器），因此必须在目标数据集上验证度量选择，而非从其他数据集学习。基于提示的LLM裁判避免了自动评分器遭遇的随机水平崩溃（LFQA无崩溃），但并非始终最优，成本高出约100倍且非确定性，仅转移而非消除验证负担。

summary: General-purpose large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used for mental health-related conversations, yet safety safeguards remain inadequate and inconsistent across clinical conditions. This study evaluates six proprietary LLMs across 16 DSM-5 conditions using four adversarial attack variants, introducing an eight-dimension harm taxonomy and a multi-dimensional evaluation framework. Results show that safeguards hold reliably only for suicide and self-harm, while conditions such as eating disorders, substance use disorder, and major depressive disorder exhibit failure rates of up to 100%. We argue that ethical design and deployment of these LLMs demand clearly defined harm categories across clinical conditions and implementation of safeguards accordingly. Until such safeguards are in place, these models pose significant risks to vulnerable populations, making their growing integration into educational settings a particularly concerning.
title: One Year Later...The Harms Persist, But So Do We!
title_translated: 一年后……危害依然存在，但我们仍在坚持！
summary_translated: 通用型大语言模型（LLMs）越来越多地用于心理健康相关对话，但安全防护措施在不同临床状况下仍不充分且不一致。本研究通过四种对抗性攻击变体，在16种DSM-5诊断类别上评估了六种专有LLMs，并引入了一个包含八个维度的危害分类体系及多维评估框架。结果显示，仅在自杀和自残情况下的防护措施可靠，而进食障碍、物质使用障碍和重度抑郁症等病症的失败率高达100%。我们主张，这些LLMs的伦理化设计与部署需要在各类临床状况下明确定义危害类别并相应实施防护措施。在这些防护措施到位之前，这些模型对脆弱人群构成重大风险，尤其令人担忧的是其在教育场景中的日益融合。

summary: Knowledge-Based Visual Question Answering (KB-VQA) requires grounding visual queries to external knowledge beyond directly observable content in images. While recent multi modal large language models (MLLMs) show strong perceptual abilities, they struggle on KB-VQA tasks requiring groundings from both fine-grained entity and evidence levels. Most existing multi-modal retrieval augmented generation (MM-RAG) methods tightly couple entity discrimination and section-level evidence ranking into a single re-ranking stage, leading to high cost and limited generalization. In this work, we revisit existing MM-RAG solutions from a workflow perspective and argue both entity-level and fact-level groundings are key bottlenecks. We observe that although MLLMs often fail under open-ended entity naming, they can better identify the correct entity when selecting from a small set of candidate names. Based on this insight, we propose a simple and training-free identify-before-answer IBA framework that decouples entity identification from section-level re-ranking. Our approach prompts an MLLM to select high-confidence entities using only candidate names, followed by an off-the-shelf textual re-ranker for evidence selection. Experiments on Encyclopedic-VQA and InfoSeek show that our method consistently outperforms fine-tuned multi-modal re-ranking baselines while reducing training and inference complexity. Additional analyses reveal that the improvements arise not only from better entity identification, but also from selecting more informative evidence once correct entity is fixed. Our implementation is made public to ease reproducibility.
title: Ground Then Rank: Revisiting Knowledge-Based VQA with Training-Free Entity Identification
comment: Accepted by ACL 2026 Findings. Project page this https URL
title_translated: 先定位再排序：无需训练的实体识别重访知识驱动视觉问答
summary_translated: 基于知识的视觉问答（KB-VQA）要求将视觉问题与图像中直接可见内容之外的外部知识进行关联。尽管近期多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）展现出强大的感知能力，但在需要细粒度实体和证据层面定位的KB-VQA任务上仍表现不佳。大多数现有多模态检索增强生成（MM-RAG）方法将实体判别与段落级证据排序紧密耦合于单一重排序阶段，导致成本高且泛化能力有限。本文从工作流视角重新审视现有MM-RAG方案，认为实体级和事实级定位均为关键瓶颈。我们观察到，尽管MLLM在开放式实体命名时经常失败，但在从少量候选名称中选择时能更准确识别正确实体。基于此洞察，我们提出一种简单且无需训练的“先识别后回答”（IBA）框架，将实体识别与段落级重排序解耦。该方法首先通过提示引导MLLM仅使用候选名称选择高置信度实体，随后使用现成文本重排序器进行证据选择。在Encyclopedic-VQA和InfoSeek上的实验表明，我们的方法在性能上持续优于微调的多模态重排序基线，同时显著降低训练与推理复杂度。额外分析显示，性能提升不仅源于更好的实体识别，也源于在正确实体确定后能选择更具信息量的证据。代码已公开以促进复现。

summary: Qualitative product feedback can reveal nuanced user experiences, but its implicit sentiment is difficult to measure. This paper presents a scalable and interpretable framework that uses large language models (LLMs) to quantify product desirability from such data. Using two Product Desirability Toolkit (PDT) datasets from ZORQ and CARMA comprising 106 respondent term groupings with gold-standard human annotation, zero-shot continuous numerical sentiment scoring and categorical sentiment classification are evaluated without relying on explicit review scores. Across the datasets, LLMs generated numerical sentiment scores directly from qualitative responses and closely matched expert labels, achieving Pearson correlations up to 0.97 and classification accuracy up to 94%. LLMs maintained robustness even when handling data presented in multiple forms and consistently expressed high confidence. In contrast, lexicon-based and transformer baselines did not produce statistically significant results. Among the models tested, GPT-4o-mini achieved performance comparable to larger models at 94% lower cost, supporting scalable deployment.   The framework also incorporates model confidence ratings and human-readable rationale explanations (xAI), improving interpretability, transparency, and trust while supporting practical use in product satisfaction assessment. In general, using the PDT tool as a survey method along with a cost efficient LLM for sentiment analysis has the potential to provide for product evaluation with results that are rich in terms of sentiment scores (both numerical and classified sentiment) and in terms of the high-level user impressions of the product that can be used to identify ideas for product development and improvement, as well as marketing ideas for target audiences.
title: Evaluating LLM Usage for Efficient and Explainable Numerical and Classified Implicit Sentiment Analysis of Product Desirability
comment: 20 pages, 6 figures, 11 tables. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2408.01527
title_translated: 评估大语言模型在高效且可解释的数值与分类隐式情感分析中的应用：以产品吸引力为例
summary_translated: 定性产品反馈可揭示用户细微体验，但其隐式情感难以量化测量。本文提出一种可扩展且可解释的框架，利用大语言模型（LLMs）从此类数据中量化产品吸引力。基于ZORQ和CARMA提供的两个产品吸引力工具包（PDT）数据集，涵盖106个受访者的术语分组及黄金标准人工标注，本文在不依赖显式评分的情况下，评估了零样本连续数值情感评分与分类情感判断。在所有数据集中，LLMs能够直接从定性回复生成数值情感分数，并与专家标签高度吻合，皮尔逊相关系数最高达0.97，分类准确率最高达94%。LLMs在处理多种呈现形式的数据时仍保持稳健性，并始终表现出高置信度。相比之下，基于词典和Transformer的基线模型未产生统计显著结果。在所测试模型中，GPT-4o-mini在成本降低94%的前提下实现了与更大模型相当的性能，支持大规模部署。该框架还整合了模型置信度评分与人类可读的理由解释（xAI），提升了可解释性、透明度与信任度，支持在产品满意度评估中的实际应用。总体而言，结合PDT调查方法与低成本LLM进行情感分析，有望提供丰富的情感评分（数值与分类）以及高层次的用户产品印象，可用于识别产品开发与改进思路，以及目标受众的营销策略。

summary: Emergent misalignment (EM) has been linked to the activation of misaligned persona vectors and evil character traits, suggesting that EM operates through disruption of the model's aligned character rather than direct learning of harmful content. Motivated by this connection, we study self-generated text recognition (SGTR) finetuning as a character-targeted intervention that is distinct from existing in-training defenses. We conduct two-stage finetuning experiments across three models (GPT-4.1, Qwen2.5-32B-Instruct, Seed-OSS-36B-Instruct) and multiple EM datasets to compare SGTR finetuning against benign finetuning baselines (correct domain-specific data, general knowledge, and word counting) to find it an effective defense in both reversal and prevention settings. We find that all interventions produce comparable EM reversal, but only when restoring capabilities that EM had degraded. For prevention, only SGTR finetuning consistently reduces misalignment without exacerbating any individual metric, suggesting that character fortification specifically drives prevention. We provide further evidence for EM's relation to the LLM's default character by showing that EM finetuning induces diversity into the LLM's identity self-reports, artificially corrupting self-recognition exacerbates misalignment caused by EM finetuning, and that removing the model's identity-bearing system prompt substantially reduces the effect of EM finetuning. Together, these findings reframe EM not as the adoption of a coherent misaligned persona but as the destabilization of aligned character.
title: Self-Recognition Finetuning can Prevent and Reverse Emergent Misalignment
title_translated: 自我识别微调可预防并逆转新兴错位现象
summary_translated: 新兴错位（EM）已被证实与错误对齐的人格向量及邪恶角色特征的激活有关，表明EM通过破坏模型对齐人格而非直接学习有害内容来运作。受此关联启发，我们研究了自生成文本识别（SGTR）微调作为一种针对人格的干预手段，区别于现有的训练中防御机制。我们在三个模型（GPT-4.1、Qwen2.5-32B-Instruct、Seed-OSS-36B-Instruct）上开展两阶段微调实验，对比SGTR微调与良性微调基线（特定领域正确数据、通用知识、词频统计）在多个EM数据集上的表现，发现其在逆转与预防两种情境下均具有效性。我们发现所有干预措施在EM逆转方面效果相当，但前提是恢复了EM所削弱的能力。在预防方面，只有SGTR微调能持续降低错位程度而不恶化任一指标，表明人格强化是预防的关键。我们进一步提供了EM与LLM默认人格相关的证据：EM微调使LLM身份自述产生多样性，人为干扰自我识别会加剧EM微调引发的错位，且移除模型的身份承载系统提示可显著减弱EM微调的影响。综合来看，这些发现重新定义了EM并非采纳一个连贯的错位人格，而是对对齐人格的不稳定化过程。

summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) grounds Large Language Models in external knowledge, yet current evaluations rely on discrete heuristics that suffer from ''epistemic blindness'' - failing to distinguish genuine contextual information extraction from parametric memory recall. To address this, we introduce the Normalized Context Utilization (NCU) metric, leveraging continuous token log-probabilities across zero-shot, oracle, and adversarial conditions to strictly quantify contextual information gain. Evaluating architectures ranging from 1.5B to 72B parameters alongside a proprietary commercial API reveals that for strict factual extraction (without Chain-of-Thought reasoning), traditional scaling laws exhibit extreme diminishing returns: highly efficient Small Language Models (SLMs) match or outperform high-capacity architectures. Furthermore, we demonstrate that ``Prior Dominance'' correlates with model scale and proprietary alignments. The evaluated commercial API not only overrode explicit external evidence in nearly half of adversarial conflicts, but also frequently suffered from systemic confidence collapse (Negative Transfer) when its parametric priors were contradicted. Our findings highlight the structural epistemic advantage and superior contextual adherence of SLMs in strict extraction workflows.
title: Quantifying Prior Dominance in RAG Systems
title_translated: 量化RAG系统中的先验主导现象
summary_translated: 检索增强生成（RAG）通过外部知识为大语言模型提供支撑，但当前评估方法依赖离散启发式规则，存在‘认识论盲区’——无法区分真正的上下文信息提取与参数化记忆召回。为此，我们提出归一化上下文利用率（NCU）指标，利用零样本、理想和对抗性条件下的连续token对数概率，严格量化上下文信息增益。在从15亿到720亿参数的多种架构及一个专有商业API上的评估表明，对于严格的事实提取任务（不包含思维链推理），传统缩放定律表现出极端的收益递减：高效的小语言模型（SLMs）在性能上可媲美甚至超越高容量架构。此外，我们证明‘先验主导’现象与模型规模及专有对齐有关。所评估的商业API不仅在近一半对抗性冲突中覆盖了明确的外部证据，而且在其参数先验被反驳时经常出现系统性置信度崩溃（负迁移）。我们的发现突显了SLMs在严格提取工作流中具有的结构性认识论优势和更优的上下文一致性。

summary: Graph-based text classification models typically rely on local neighborhood aggregation and overlook global community structure, despite semantic document graphs exhibiting strong class-consistent clustering. Ignoring this can blur class boundaries and lead to over-smoothing. We propose ModTGCN, a modularity-aware graph neural network for text classification that jointly optimizes cross-entropy and a modularity-based auxiliary objective to promote class-coherent document communities while preserving discriminative representations. The modularity term is computed on a document-document similarity graph derived from transformer embeddings (pretrained or fine-tuned). To improve scalability, we decouple the original heterogeneous TextGCN graph into separate document-word and word-word components, achieving 2x-10x faster training. We further study graph construction strategies, label-aware edge reweighting, and supervision choices for modularity optimization. Experiments on five benchmarks show consistent gains, with larger improvements on complex, low homophily datasets such as Ohsumed and 20NG.
title: ModTGCN: Modularity-aware Graph Neural Networks for Text Classification
title_translated: ModTGCN：面向文本分类的模块化感知图神经网络
summary_translated: 基于图的文本分类模型通常依赖局部邻域聚合，忽视了语义文档图中强烈的类别一致聚类特性。忽略这一结构会导致类别边界模糊并引发过平滑问题。我们提出ModTGCN，一种模块化感知的图神经网络用于文本分类，通过联合优化交叉熵损失与基于模块性的辅助目标，促进类别一致的文档社区形成，同时保持判别性表示。模块性项基于Transformer嵌入（预训练或微调）构建的文档-文档相似性图计算得出。为提升可扩展性，我们将原始异构TextGCN图解耦为独立的文档-词和词-词组件，实现2至10倍的训练加速。我们进一步研究了图构建策略、标签感知边权重重分配以及模块性优化的监督选择。在五个基准数据集上的实验显示稳定提升，尤其在Ohsumed和20NG等复杂且低同质性数据集上效果更显著。

summary: Text-to-SQL enables users to query databases using natural language by generating executable SQL queries. Recent methods have increasingly adopted Large Language Models based reinforcement learning (RL) to leverage execution feedback for training. However, existing RL methods assign uniform query-level rewards to all clauses in a SQL query, treating correct and incorrect clauses equally. This coarse-grained reward design leads to insufficient learning signals for correct SQL generation. To address this issue, we propose EXPO-SQL (EXecution-based clause-level Policy Optimization for Text-to-SQL) which provides fine-grained supervision through clause-level rewards. To assign clause-level rewards, our method identifies erroneous clauses by analyzing execution results, including error messages and clause-wise incremental execution. Experiments on widely-used Text-to-SQL benchmarks demonstrate that EXPO-SQL significantly outperforms existing supervised fine-tuning, prompting, and RL-based methods through fine-grained clause-level learning. Our code is available at https://github. com/jhn25/EXPO-SQL.
title: EXPO-SQL: Execution-based Clause-level Policy Optimization for Text-to-SQL
title_translated: EXPO-SQL：基于执行反馈的文本到SQL语句级策略优化
summary_translated: 文本到SQL任务使用户能够通过自然语言查询数据库，生成可执行的SQL语句。近期方法越来越多地采用基于大语言模型的强化学习（RL），利用执行反馈进行训练。然而，现有RL方法对SQL语句中所有子句统一赋予查询级奖励，将正确与错误子句同等对待，导致学习信号不足。为解决此问题，我们提出EXPO-SQL（基于执行的语句级策略优化），通过子句级奖励提供细粒度监督。该方法通过分析执行结果（包括错误信息和子句级增量执行）识别错误子句。在广泛使用的文本到SQL基准测试上的实验表明，EXPO-SQL通过细粒度的子句级学习，显著优于现有的监督微调、提示工程和基于RL的方法。代码已公开于https://github.com/jhn25/EXPO-SQL。

summary: Prompt-based learning has emerged as a dominant paradigm in natural language processing. This study explores the impact of diverse pre-training objectives on the performance of encoder-decoder pre-trained language models across generation and question answering tasks, with a focus on commonsense knowledge retrieval and completion. We highlight the benefits of incorporating multiple objectives during both pre-training and fine-tuning stages. We introduce the Match Task to Objective (MTO) framework and methods for determining the appropriate objective for a given task. This framework offers automated methods to prepare task-related data for adaptation through unsupervised training, based on the identified objective. In the fine-tuning stage, we design novel templates that align with the objectives of the pre-training and adaptation stages. When aligned with task requirements, these strategies can achieve a performance gain of over 120\% compared to conventional methods in few-shot settings. They significantly outperform related works in few-shot settings and exceed the baseline even in full-dataset scenarios. Furthermore, we extend this approach to include prompt-tuning methodologies, providing guidance for more effective soft prompt engineering and optimization. Our strategies significantly enhance prompt-tuning performance as well. These insights hold substantial value, precisely guiding the selection and optimization of models customized for specific tasks. Code is available at https://github.com/puraminy/MTO/
title: Matching Tasks to Objectives: Fine-Tuning and Prompt-Tuning Strategies for Encoder-Decoder Pre-trained Language Models
title_translated: 任务与目标匹配：编码器-解码器预训练语言模型的微调与提示微调策略
summary_translated: 基于提示的学习已成为自然语言处理中的主流范式。本研究探讨了不同预训练目标对编码器-解码器预训练语言模型在生成和问答任务中的影响，重点关注常识知识检索与补全。我们强调在预训练和微调阶段引入多目标的益处。我们提出了任务与目标匹配（MTO）框架及确定特定任务适用目标的方法。该框架提供自动化方法，基于识别出的目标通过无监督训练准备任务相关数据以实现适配。在微调阶段，我们设计了与预训练和适配阶段目标对齐的新模板。当与任务需求对齐时，这些策略在少样本设置下相比传统方法性能提升超过120%。它们在少样本场景中显著优于相关工作，并在全数据集场景下也超越基线。此外，我们将该方法扩展至提示微调，为更有效的软提示工程与优化提供指导。我们的策略显著提升了提示微调性能。这些洞见具有重要价值，可精准指导针对特定任务的模型选择与优化。代码已公开于https://github.com/puraminy/MTO/

summary: Large Audio-Language Models (LALMs) have been widely used as judge models for the automatic evaluation of generated speech. However, prior approaches predominantly focus on holistic naturalness, leaving fine-grained paralinguistic distinctions underexplored. We introduce ParaPairAudioBench, a pairwise benchmark of 5,175 audio pairs across five paralinguistic dimensions: Style, Rate, Emphasis, Age, and Gender. Our experiments show that current LALM judges still lag behind human judgments by 32%p on average and exhibit severe calibration failures, particularly in Tie cases where the correct decision is to abstain. To further analyze lexical versus acoustic reliance, the benchmark includes both same-transcript and cross-transcript conditions. ParaPairAudioBench enables multi-dimensional, calibration-aware assessment of the reliability of LALM-as-a-Judge for paralinguistic speech evaluation.
title: ParaPairAudioBench: Paralinguistic Pairwise Audio Benchmark for LALM-as-a-Judge
title_translated: ParaPairAudioBench：用于LALM作为裁判的副语言成对音频基准
summary_translated: 大音频-语言模型（LALMs）已被广泛用作生成语音自动评估的裁判模型。然而，以往方法主要关注整体自然度，忽略了细粒度的副语言差异。我们引入ParaPairAudioBench，一个包含5,175个音频对的成对基准，涵盖五种副语言维度：风格、语速、强调、年龄和性别。实验表明，当前LALM裁判平均比人类判断落后32个百分点，且在“应放弃判断”的平局情况中表现出严重的校准失败。为深入分析词汇与声学依赖关系，该基准包含相同转录和跨转录两种条件。ParaPairAudioBench支持对LALM作为裁判在副语言语音评估中的可靠性进行多维度、校准感知的评估。

summary: Scaling adversarial evaluation of large language models requires both a method for generating hard inputs and a reliable way to confirm that resulting failures are real. We present AdversaBench, an end-to-end red-teaming pipeline that mutates seed prompts with five structured operators, queries a target model, and confirms failures through a three-judge panel with a meta-judge tiebreaker. We report experiments on 45 seeds across three categories: reasoning, instruction-following, and tool use. Every seed produced a confirmed failure. Four findings stand out. First, operator effectiveness varies sharply by category: inject_distractor scores 0.00 mean reward on instruction-following seeds but 0.80-0.83 on reasoning and tool-use. Second, binary failure rate hides difficulty: instruction-following seeds required 2.4 attacker iterations on average versus 1.1 for other categories, a gap visible in survival curves. Third, pairwise judge agreement of 80-87% coexists with near-zero Cohen's kappa due to label skew; category-level disagreement rates are more informative. Fourth, adversarial prompts generated against Llama 3.1 8B transfer zero-shot to Llama 3.3 70B, suggesting the mutations exploit general behavioral patterns rather than model-specific weaknesses. Code, dataset, and analysis scripts are available at https://github.com/khanak0509/AdversaBench .
title: AdversaBench: Automated LLM Red-Teaming with Multi-Judge Confirmation and Cross-Model Transferability
comment: 10 pages, 4 figures, 5 tables. Code and data at this https URL
title_translated: AdversaBench：基于多裁判确认与跨模型可迁移性的自动化大语言模型红队测试
summary_translated: 大规模语言模型的对抗性评估需要一种生成困难输入的方法以及可靠的方式来确认结果失败的真实性。我们提出了AdversaBench，一个端到端的红队测试流程，通过五种结构化操作符对初始提示进行变异，查询目标模型，并通过三名裁判组成的评审团结合元裁判仲裁来确认失败。我们在三个类别（推理、指令遵循、工具使用）共45个种子样本上进行了实验，每个种子均产生了经确认的失败。四个关键发现突出：第一，不同操作符在各类别中效果差异显著：inject_distractor在指令遵循类种子上的平均奖励为0.00，而在推理和工具使用类中为0.80-0.83；第二，二元失败率掩盖了实际难度：指令遵循类种子平均需2.4次攻击迭代，而其他类别仅为1.1次，这一差距在生存曲线中可见；第三，裁判间两两一致性达80%-87%，但因标签偏斜导致Cohen's kappa接近零，因此类别级分歧率更具信息量；第四，针对Llama 3.1 8B生成的对抗性提示可零样本迁移到Llama 3.3 70B，表明这些变异利用的是通用行为模式而非特定模型弱点。代码、数据集和分析脚本可在https://github.com/khanak0509/AdversaBench 获取。

summary: Rare diseases affect millions of individuals worldwide, yet timely diagnosis remains a major public health challenge due to scarcity of specialized clinical expertise. While large language models (LLMs) show promise to support rare disease diagnosis, current models are constrained by insufficient clinical deployability, limited clinically grounded evidence, and scarcity of training data. Here we present RaDaR (Rare Disease navigatoR), an open-source, compact reasoning LLM (32B parameters) for rare disease diagnosis. RaDaR was trained with 49,170 publicly available free-text cases and 104,666 synthetic cases with reasoning-enhanced training. RaDaR showed the strongest performance among evaluated open-source models, including the 671B DeepSeek-R1, across public benchmarks and four external validation centers. In a retrospective cohort, RaDaR prioritized the final diagnosis before documented clinical suspicion in 61.06 percent of cases, corresponding to a potential lead time of 1.87 months and 50.18 percent of the within-center interval. In a randomized physician-assistance trial, RaDaR assistance improved physicians' rare-disease diagnostic accuracy by 21.44 percentage points compared with internet search alone. Synthetic-data ablations suggested that phenotype-anchored narratives provide useful training signal for long-tail rare diseases, with a monotonic scaling trend within the tested data range. Together, RaDaR and its development and validation framework provide a deployable rare-disease reasoning model and a reproducible development framework for diagnostic AI under data scarcity.
title: A specialized reasoning large language model for accelerating rare disease diagnosis: a randomized AI physician assistance trial
title_translated: 用于加速罕见病诊断的专用推理型大语言模型：一项随机AI医生辅助试验
summary_translated: 罕见病影响全球数百万人，但及时诊断仍是重大公共卫生挑战，主要由于专业临床专家稀缺。尽管大语言模型（LLMs）在支持罕见病诊断方面展现出潜力，但现有模型受限于临床部署能力不足、缺乏临床依据以及训练数据稀缺。本文提出RaDaR（Rare Disease navigatoR），一个开源、紧凑的推理型大语言模型（32B参数），专用于罕见病诊断。RaDaR基于49,170个公开自由文本病例和104,666个增强推理能力的合成病例进行训练。在多个公开基准和四个外部验证中心中，RaDaR的表现优于所有评估过的开源模型，包括671B参数的DeepSeek-R1。在回顾性队列研究中，RaDaR在61.06%的病例中提前于临床怀疑确定最终诊断，平均提前1.87个月，占中心内时间间隔的50.18%。在一项随机医生辅助试验中，与仅使用互联网搜索相比，RaDaR辅助使医生的罕见病诊断准确率提升了21.44个百分点。合成数据消融实验表明，以表型为基础的叙事为长尾罕见病提供了有效的训练信号，在测试数据范围内呈现单调增长趋势。综上，RaDaR及其开发与验证框架提供了一个可部署的罕见病推理模型，以及在数据稀缺条件下可复现的诊断AI开发范式。

summary: Bearing fault diagnosis faces critical challenges when dataset heterogeneity, operating condition variations, and limited labeled data occur simultaneously in industrial environments. Existing approaches address these issues in isolation and rely on implicit feature alignment, limiting effectiveness under concurrent challenges. This paper proposes a knowledge-guided two-stage transfer learning framework that employs a lightweight GPT-2-style Transformer with causal self-attention for hierarchical feature extraction from vibration signals, establishing explicit pathways where pre-trained encoder weights and fault prototype embeddings serve as knowledge carriers from multi-source pre-training to target adaptation. The framework addresses the dual-shift challenge through multi-source learning for generalizable representations, prototype-based knowledge modulation for target adaptation, and taxonomy-adaptive classification for seamless transfer across heterogeneous fault categories. Experimental validation on four real-world datasets demonstrates 92.61% average accuracy with only 10% labeled target data, outperforming state-of-the-art methods by 17.24 percentage points, establishing a practical pathway toward cost-effective predictive maintenance in Industry 4.0 applications.
title: An LLM-based Two-Stage Transformer Framework for Cross-Domain Bearing Fault Diagnosis with Limited Data
comment: Accepted as a conference article of AIM 2026
title_translated: 基于大语言模型的两阶段Transformer框架用于有限数据下的跨域轴承故障诊断
summary_translated: 在工业环境中，当数据异质性、工况变化和标注数据有限同时发生时，轴承故障诊断面临严峻挑战。现有方法通常孤立地处理这些问题，依赖隐式特征对齐，难以应对多重并发挑战。本文提出一种知识引导的两阶段迁移学习框架，采用轻量级GPT-2风格Transformer，结合因果自注意力机制，从振动信号中提取分层特征，建立明确的知识传递路径：预训练编码器权重和故障原型嵌入作为多源预训练到目标适应的知识载体。该框架通过多源学习实现可泛化的表示，基于原型的知识调制实现目标适应，以及分类器的分类税则自适应实现跨异构故障类别的无缝迁移。在四个真实世界数据集上的实验验证表明，仅使用10%的标注目标数据即可达到92.61%的平均准确率，比当前最先进方法高出17.24个百分点，为工业4.0应用中的低成本预测性维护提供了一条实用路径。

summary: Modern coding agents pair LLM generators with various tools, including cheap diagnostics and expensive verifiers. The tool-use decisions are typically governed by orchestrators that often use fixed rules and ignore uncertainty. We formulate orchestration as cost-sensitive sequential hypothesis testing: a Bayesian controller maintains a belief over candidate correctness and dynamically decides whether to gather more evidence, refine the candidate, verify it, or stop. Across six generators and nine coding benchmarks, Bayesian control proves to be most valuable when verification is costly and critics are informative but imperfect. Beyond control, the belief state yields an interpretable correctness score that outperforms token-probability and raw tool-success baselines for uncertainty quantification.
title: Bayesian control for coding agents
title_translated: 面向编程智能体的贝叶斯控制
summary_translated: 现代编程智能体将大语言模型生成器与多种工具（如廉价诊断工具和昂贵验证器）结合使用。工具使用决策通常由调度器控制，但这类调度器常采用固定规则且忽略不确定性。我们将调度建模为成本敏感的序列假设检验：一个贝叶斯控制器维持对候选正确性的信念，并动态决定是否收集更多证据、优化候选、验证它或停止。在六个生成器和九个编程基准上的实验表明，当验证成本高且批评者信息丰富但不完美时，贝叶斯控制最为有效。除了控制之外，信念状态还生成可解释的正确性评分，其在不确定性量化方面优于token概率和原始工具成功率基线。

summary: We introduce Age of LLM, a turn-based 1v1 benchmark in which two LLMs face off on a 13x7 grid to destroy the enemy base. Three stressors are deliberate: fog of war, full diplomacy (messages, ceasefires, ultimatums; uranium kept secret), and a reliability dimension where every turn must follow a strict JSON schema and an illegal action is silently discarded. The engine is private and each match uses a fresh random map seed and opponent, mitigating the data contamination that affects public benchmarks. Models receive a (near) rule-only prompt with no build-order advice (two tactical seed phrases were present during data collection; see Section 2.7). We benchmark 15 reasoning models across 54 matches and 5,258 actions. Findings: (1) the nuclear rush dominates (78% on the rules-coherent v0.11+ sub-corpus; 85% corpus-wide) with a sole-launcher signature that is largely mechanical under secret-simultaneous launch rules, not a cognitive deterrence failure; (2) military conquest is rare but faster (12.3 vs 18.9 turns); (3) diplomacy is prolific yet almost never consummated; (4) ~58% of illegal actions are fog/state errors, making the illegal-action rate a measure of belief-tracking; (5) -- the least established, and the only one we label exploratory -- a weak link associates reliability with winning. The corpus is small, unbalanced and not side-swapped, so the ranking is a preliminary descriptive view, not a contribution. Beyond ranking, the turn-by-turn traces of actions and messages make the corpus a lens on how LLMs reason under adversarial uncertainty -- their belief-tracking, spontaneous deception, and per-model cognitive "personas" -- which we frame as a future research direction. We release the replay format, an isometric viewer and all replays; engine source on request.
title: Age of LLM: A Strategic 1v1 Benchmark for Reasoning, Diplomacy and Reliability of Large Language Models under Fog of War
comment: 25 pages including appendices, 8 figures, 4 tables; appendices include verbatim system prompt and engine resolution pseudocode. All correlations reported with p-values, 95% bootstrap confidence intervals and Spearman's rho; includes a Steiger test and Bradley-Terry fit
title_translated: 大语言模型时代：在迷雾战局下评估推理、外交与可靠性的战略1v1基准
summary_translated: 我们引入Age of LLM，一个回合制1v1基准测试，两个大语言模型在13x7网格上对战，目标是摧毁敌方基地。设计了三种刻意施加的压力因素：迷雾战局、完全外交（消息、停火、最后通牒；铀资源保密）以及可靠性维度——每回合必须严格遵循JSON格式，非法动作将被静默丢弃。引擎为私有，每场比赛使用新的随机地图种子和对手，避免了公共基准中存在的数据污染问题。模型仅接收（近似）仅规则提示，无建造顺序建议（数据收集期间仅有两个战术种子短语存在；见第2.7节）。我们在15个推理模型上进行了54场比赛和5,258次行动的基准测试。主要发现：(1) 核弹突袭占据主导地位（规则一致的v0.11+子语料中占78%，全语料中占85%），其单一发射者特征在秘密同步发射规则下基本为机械行为，而非认知威慑失效；(2) 军事征服虽少见但更快（12.3 vs 18.9回合）；(3) 外交频繁但几乎从未达成协议；(4) 约58%的非法动作源于迷雾/状态错误，使非法动作率成为信念追踪能力的度量；(5) —— 最不明确且唯一我们标记为探索性的发现——弱关联显示可靠性与胜率相关。语料规模小、不平衡且未进行双方互换，因此排名仅为初步描述性视图，非核心贡献。超越排名，逐回合的动作与消息轨迹使该语料成为观察大语言模型在对抗不确定性下推理方式的窗口——包括信念追踪、自发欺骗以及模型特有的认知“人格”——我们将其视为未来研究方向。我们发布了回放格式、等距查看器及所有回放；引擎源码可申请获取。

summary: Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE) enables computations to be performed directly on encrypted data while preserving data confidentiality. However, its practical applications remain limited by high computational costs and development complexity. This paper presents ComputeFHE, an open-source C++ library that facilitates the development of privacy-preserving applications based on the TFHE cryptosystem. The library provides encrypted integer and fixed-point data types together with arithmetic, logical, comparison, conditional, and oblivious array-access operations which allow developers to implement algorithms using a familiar imperative programming paradigm. ComputeFHE supports both conventional TFHE arithmetic based on standard two-input logic gates and an optimized Arithmetic Logic Unit (ALU) architecture utilizing FHE-friendly logic primitives. Experimental results demonstrate significant reductions in the number of required bootstrapping operations, achieving performance improvements of up to 3.9x for selected operations. In addition, the library includes a simulation mode that enables testing, debugging, and complexity analysis without performing actual cryptographic computations while providing circuit complexity and bootstrapping costs. Built on top of OpenFHE, ComputeFHE offers a practical and accessible framework for developing and evaluating privacy-preserving algorithms and applications.
title: ComputeFHE: A Privacy-Preserving General-Purpose Computation Library
title_translated: ComputeFHE：一种隐私保护的通用计算库
summary_translated: 全同态加密（FHE）能够在加密数据上直接执行计算，同时保持数据机密性。然而，其实际应用受限于高昂的计算成本和开发复杂性。本文提出ComputeFHE，一个基于TFHE密码系统的开源C++库，旨在促进基于FHE的隐私保护应用开发。该库提供了加密整数和定点数据类型，以及算术、逻辑、比较、条件和无感知数组访问等操作，使开发者能够使用熟悉的命令式编程范式实现算法。ComputeFHE支持基于标准双输入逻辑门的传统TFHE算术，也支持利用FHE友好逻辑原语的优化算术逻辑单元（ALU）架构。实验结果表明，所需引导操作次数显著减少，部分操作性能提升高达3.9倍。此外，该库包含模拟模式，可在不进行实际密码计算的情况下实现测试、调试和复杂度分析，并提供电路复杂度和引导成本信息。基于OpenFHE构建的ComputeFHE为开发和评估隐私保护算法与应用提供了实用且易用的框架。

summary: Petroleum-engineering search exposes a supervision gap for strong general retrievers: relevant evidence exists in public web text, but domain relevance labels are scarce. To address this gap, we propose PETRA, a large-scale Petroleum Engineering Text for Retrieval Adaptation dataset and pipeline that converts noisy public web data into a curated domain corpus and synthetic supervision for dense retrieval and reranking. PETRA contains 1.36M curated chunks, approximately 2B token equivalents, $\approx$859k, embedding training rows from $\approx$224k anchors, and roughly 400k teacher-scored reranker candidate rows. Its construction combines high-recall energy-domain curation, an energy-domain classifier with 98.4% test accuracy, chunk-grounded query generation, LLM-written hard negatives, and retrieval-mined candidate lists. PETRA improves first-stage in-domain Normalized Discounted Cumulative Gain (nDCG) from 0.703 to 0.763 through score fusion. Reranker adaptation improves the public Earth Science benchmark by 44% relative and a six-task reasoning-intensive panel by 23%. Failed training recipes show that high train-holdout accuracy on synthetic labels does not predict retrieval gains; retrieval-mined data helps only after being repackaged as teacher-scored candidate lists sampled from the inference-time candidate distribution.
title: PETRA: Transforming Web Text for Petroleum-Engineering Domain Adaptation
title_translated: PETRA：面向石油工程领域的网页文本转换方法
summary_translated: 石油工程领域的搜索面临强泛化检索器的监督缺口：相关证据存在于公开网页文本中，但领域相关标签稀缺。为解决这一问题，我们提出了PETRA，一个大规模石油工程文本用于检索适应的数据集与流程，将嘈杂的公开网络数据转化为经过筛选的领域语料库和合成监督信号，以支持密集检索与重排序。PETRA包含136万条经筛选的文本块，约20亿个词元等价量，约85.9万条嵌入训练行（来自约22.4万个锚点），以及约40万条教师评分的重排序候选行。其构建结合了高召回率能源领域筛选、测试准确率达98.4%的能源领域分类器、基于文本块的查询生成、LLM编写的困难负样本，以及通过检索挖掘的候选列表。PETRA通过分数融合将第一阶段域内归一化折损累积收益（nDCG）从0.703提升至0.763。重排序器适配使公开地球科学基准相对提升44%，六任务推理密集型评测集提升23%。失败训练案例表明，合成标签上的高训练-保留准确率并不能预测检索性能提升；只有在将检索挖掘数据重新包装为基于推理时候选分布采样的教师评分候选列表后，才能发挥有效作用。

summary: Conversational product search assistants offer a more expressive, natural, and interactive alternative to traditional keyword-based product search. With limited screen space, showing only a few items increases the need for precise preference elicitation, which can prolong conversations, leading to user frustration and session abandonment. Conversely, rushing to recommend items without a clear understanding of preferences risks poor matches and a degraded user experience. We present Dialogue to Discovery (D2D), an attribute-oriented preference elicitation framework that dynamically exploits the structure of product attributes to efficiently steer conversations toward the user's desired item. D2D adaptively prioritizes the most informative queries and strategically times product recommendations, reducing premature or off-target suggestions that harm engagement. To evaluate D2D, we curate three datasets from the Amazon Reviews corpus. In simulated conversations modelled using a multi-factor utilitarian patience framework, D2D achieves a 22.2-29.9% improvement in target-finding accuracy, 6.6-16.1% reduction in abandonment, and 27.5% shorter average conversations over the state-of-the-art baselines. A complementary user study further confirms significant gains in both user satisfaction and perceived efficiency.
title: Dialogue to Discovery: Attribute-Aware Preference Elicitation for Conversational Product Search Assistants
title_translated: 对话到发现：面向对话式产品搜索助手的属性感知偏好获取
summary_translated: 对话式产品搜索助手为传统关键词搜索提供了更富表现力、自然且交互性强的替代方案。由于屏幕空间有限，仅展示少数商品，因此对精确偏好获取的需求更高，这可能导致对话延长，引发用户挫败感和会话中断。相反，若在未充分理解偏好情况下急于推荐商品，则可能造成匹配不佳，降低用户体验。我们提出Dialogue to Discovery（D2D），一种面向属性的偏好获取框架，通过动态利用产品属性结构，高效引导对话向用户期望的商品推进。D2D自适应地优先选择最具信息量的提问，并战略性地安排商品推荐时机，避免过早或偏离目标的建议，从而提升用户参与度。为评估D2D，我们从Amazon评论语料库中构建了三个数据集。在基于多因素效用耐心框架建模的模拟对话中，D2D相比现有最先进基线，在目标商品发现准确率上提升22.2%-29.9%，会话中断率降低6.6%-16.1%，平均对话时长缩短27.5%。一项补充用户研究进一步证实了用户满意度和感知效率的显著提升。

summary: Unlearning has emerged as a key technique to mitigate harmful content generation in diffusion models. However, existing methods often remove not only the target concept, but also benign co-occurring concepts. As illustrated in Fig.1, unlearning nudity can unintentionally suppress the concept of person, preventing a model from generating images with person. We define these undesirably suppressed co-occurring concepts that must be preserved CARE (Co-occurring Associated REtained concepts). Then, we introduce the CARE score, a general metric that directly quantifies their preservation across unlearning tasks. With this foundation, we propose ReCARE (Robust erasure for CARE), a framework that explicitly safeguards CARE while erasing only the target concept. ReCARE automatically constructs the CARE-set, a curated vocabulary of benign co-occurring tokens extracted from target images, and leverages this vocabulary during training for stable unlearning. Extensive experiments across various target concepts (Nudity, Van Gogh style, and Tench object) demonstrate that ReCARE achieves overall state-of-the-art performance in balancing robust concept erasure, overall utility, and CARE preservation.
title: Co-occurring associated retained concepts in Diffusion Unlearning
comment: Accepted as a poster at ICLR 2026. Code available at this https URL
title_translated: 扩散模型去学习中的共现关联保留概念
summary_translated: 去学习已成为缓解扩散模型中有害内容生成的关键技术。然而，现有方法往往不仅移除目标概念，还意外删除了良性共现概念。如图1所示，去学习去除裸露内容时，可能无意中抑制了“人物”概念，导致模型无法生成含人物的图像。为此，我们定义这些必须保留但被不当抑制的共现关联概念为CARE（Co-occurring Associated REtained concepts）。随后，我们提出CARE分数，一种可直接量化各类去学习任务中CARE概念保留程度的通用指标。在此基础上，我们提出ReCARE（Robust erasure for CARE）框架，明确保护CARE概念的同时仅擦除目标概念。ReCARE能自动构建CARE集合——从目标图像中提取的良性共现标记词汇表，并在训练过程中利用该词汇表实现稳定的去学习。在多种目标概念（裸露、梵高风格、Tench物体）上的大量实验表明，ReCARE在稳健概念擦除、整体实用性与CARE保留之间实现了当前最优平衡。

summary: Large language models are making research production scalable, shifting the bottleneck from producing artifacts to judging claims. We present \textsc{Agon}, a research orchestrator that validates what can be checked inside the workflow and leaves the remaining judgments to human scientists. \textsc{Agon} is built on six design principles: Prompt Economy, Future-Facing, Minimal Prompts, OmniDisciplinary, Massive Parallelism, and Zero-Code. We ran \textsc{Agon} across domains for 444 iterations of Prompt Economy loops, using only small starting topics and no human-written experimental code. These deployments demonstrate scalability while exposing new classes of failure. We organize these failures into a taxonomy along severity, fixability, visibility, and capability locus. The taxonomy separates failures the loops can see and fix from those that require human judgment. Together, these results show that \textsc{Agon} is pushing research toward a new paradigm: machine scales, human steers.
title: Agon: An Autonomous Large-Scale Omnidisciplinary Research System Built on Prompt Economy
title_translated: Agon：基于提示经济的自主大规模跨学科研究系统
summary_translated: 大语言模型正在使研究产出规模化，将瓶颈从生成成果转向判断主张的真实性。我们提出	extsc{Agon}，一个研究协调器，它能在工作流内部验证可检查的内容，并将剩余判断留给人类科学家。	extsc{Agon}基于六大设计原则：提示经济、面向未来、最小提示、跨学科、大规模并行和零代码。我们在多个领域运行了444轮提示经济循环，仅使用小型初始主题且无需人类编写的实验代码。这些部署展示了系统的可扩展性，同时也暴露了新型失败模式。我们将这些失败按严重性、可修复性、可见性和能力定位进行分类，形成一个失败分类体系。该体系区分了系统自身可观察并修复的失败与需要人类判断的失败。综合来看，这些结果表明	extsc{Agon}正推动研究进入新范式：机器规模运作，人类主导方向。

summary: Reliable provenance for LLM outputs requires multi-bit watermarks that remain robust under editing while maintaining strict false-positive control. Existing ECC-based LLM watermarks rely largely on hard-decision decoding, discarding token-level reliability information. We propose CORE-BREW, a Constant-hit-Rate Embedding extension of block-wise BREW for robust multi-bit watermarking. CORE-BREW calibrates the watermark channel by targeting a fixed hit rate p-star, yielding closed-form per-token log-likelihood ratios (LLRs) for principled soft-decision decoding. It supports two detection modes: Strict-Safe, which preserves the bounded-distance designated-codeword acceptance region, and FPR-Calibrated, which uses likelihood-based scoring and lightweight list decoding to characterize the FPR-TPR trade-off. Experiments on open-source LLMs under token-level edits and paraphrasing demonstrate improved low-FPR discrimination and robustness over prior multi-bit watermarking baselines while maintaining comparable semantic quality.
title: CORE-BREW: LLR-Based Soft Decoding for Robust Multi-Bit LLM Watermarking
title_translated: CORE-BREW：基于LLR的软解码实现鲁棒的多比特大语言模型水印
summary_translated: 可靠的大语言模型输出溯源需要在编辑后仍保持鲁棒性的多比特水印，同时严格控制误报率。现有的基于纠错码（ECC）的大语言模型水印主要依赖硬判决解码，忽略了词元级别的可靠性信息。我们提出CORE-BREW，这是块级BREW的一种恒定命中率嵌入扩展，用于实现鲁棒的多比特水印。CORE-BREW通过设定固定的命中率p-star来校准水印信道，从而获得闭式表达的每词元对数似然比（LLR），支持原则性软判决解码。它提供两种检测模式：Strict-Safe模式保留有界距离指定码字接受区域，FPR-Calibrated模式则使用基于似然的评分和轻量级列表解码来刻画误报率与真正报率之间的权衡。在开源大语言模型上进行的词元级编辑和改写实验表明，相比先前的多比特水印基线，CORE-BREW在保持相当语义质量的同时，显著提升了低误报率下的区分能力和鲁棒性。

summary: Aligner-Encoders are recently proposed seq2seq end-to-end ASR models that replace decoder attention by predicting the uth token directly from the u-th encoder position, so the encoder must learn the alignment internally without cross-attention or a transducer lattice. In practice, this alignment often forms abruptly in the upper layers, making training sensitive and brittle on long utterances.
