We propose InterAligner, which adds an intermediate Aligner objective so alignment can form progressively across depth, together with an intermediate CTC loss (InterCTC) to stabilize optimization. On LibriSpeech with a 17-layer Conformer, a final-only Aligner reaches 5.0/7.8 WER (test-clean/other). InterCTC improves to 3.4/6.0, and InterAligner further reduces WER to 3.1/5.6 with the largest gains on long utterances.
title: Progressive Alignment Objectives for Aligner-Encoder based ASR
title_translated: 基于对齐器-编码器架构的语音识别中渐进对齐目标的研究
summary_translated: 对齐器-编码器是近期提出的序列到序列端到端语音识别模型，其通过直接从编码器第u位置预测第u个词元，取代了传统的解码器注意力机制，因此编码器必须在无交叉注意力或转换器网格的情况下内部学习对齐关系。实践中，这种对齐往往在深层突然形成，导致长语音输入时训练敏感且脆弱。我们提出InterAligner，通过引入中间对齐目标，使对齐能够沿深度逐步形成，并结合中间CTC损失（InterCTC）以稳定优化过程。在17层Conformer结构的LibriSpeech数据集上，仅在最终层使用对齐器的模型达到5.0/7.8的WER（test-clean/other）。引入InterCTC后提升至3.4/6.0，而InterAligner进一步将WER降低至3.1/5.6，尤其在长语音上的提升最为显著。

summary: The composition of training data, governed by the diversity of sources and their mixing strategy, is a cornerstone of Large Language Model (LLM) pre-training. Online Data Mixing (ODM), the technique of adaptively adjusting data mixtures during training, has emerged as a promising direction to improve efficiency. However, existing methods are constrained by their reliance on a singular optimization perspective, which fundamentally overlooks the need for complex LLM pre-training to consider the dynamic data composition from multiple dimensions. To overcome this limitation, we introduce the Holistic Data Scheduler (HDS), a novel online data mixing framework. HDS formulates the data scheduling challenge as a reinforcement learning problem in a continuous control space and leverages the Soft Actor-Critic (SAC) algorithm for its stability and sample efficiency in exploring the high-dimensional policy space. At the core of HDS lies a novel multi-objective, holistic reward function that integrates three critical perspectives: a data-driven reward for quality, a loss-driven reward capturing inter-domain influence, and a model-driven reward based on weight norms. To validate our design and determine its optimal configuration, we conducted systematic experiments on LLMs of various sizes. On The Pile benchmark, HDS reaches the final validation perplexity of the next best method with 44% fewer training iterations. Furthermore, it achieves a 7.2% improvement on the MMLU 0-shot task along with consistent gains on other benchmarks, showcasing its ability to enhance both training efficiency and final model capability.
title: Holistic Data Scheduler for LLM Pre-training via Multi-Objective Reinforcement Learning
comment: Our code is at this https URL
title_translated: 基于多目标强化学习的大语言模型预训练全息数据调度器
summary_translated: 训练数据的组成，由数据源多样性及其混合策略决定，是大语言模型预训练的核心。在线数据混合（ODM）技术通过在训练过程中自适应调整数据混合比例，已成为提升效率的有前景方向。然而，现有方法受限于单一优化视角，从根本上忽视了复杂大语言模型预训练需从多个维度动态考虑数据构成的需求。为克服这一局限，我们提出全息数据调度器（HDS），一种新颖的在线数据混合框架。HDS将数据调度问题建模为连续控制空间中的强化学习问题，并利用Soft Actor-Critic（SAC）算法以实现高维策略空间探索中的稳定性与样本效率。HDS的核心是一个新型多目标、全息奖励函数，整合了三个关键维度：基于数据的质量奖励、捕捉跨领域影响的损失驱动奖励，以及基于权重范数的模型驱动奖励。我们在多种规模的大语言模型上进行了系统实验以验证设计并确定最优配置。在The Pile基准测试中，HDS以44%更少的训练迭代次数达到了次优方法的最终验证困惑度。此外，其在MMLU零样本任务上实现了7.2%的性能提升，并在其他基准上持续取得增益，展现出其在提升训练效率与最终模型能力方面的强大潜力。

summary: Discrete diffusion language model (DLM) fine-tuning inherits inexpensive diagnostics from denoising-time confidence monitors, but their PEFT-training meaning is untested. We test top-1 argmax concentration as a collapse warning. Across 816 LoRA/PEFT configurations from three DLM families, the warning fires for every configuration while logs record 0/816 actual collapses at the 200 step horizon, giving zero precision. The cause is pre-equilibrium saturation: top-1 concentration is already high before optimization and quickly becomes insensitive to final training stability. We then evaluate max LoRA gradient norm, a parameter-side signal that samples gradient routing rather than token concentration. On a pooled held-out LLaDA-family split, a train-optimized threshold identifies top-decile final-loss configurations with precision 0.68 and F1=0.79, above the all-positive top-1 baseline even at the lower split-bootstrap confidence bound. Autoregressive controls and cross-family threshold failures bound the result to short-horizon DLM-LoRA inspection rather than a universal collapse detector. Workflow: drop top-1 as a PEFT alarm, log max-gradient early in training, and calibrate thresholds per DLM family before routing runs for inspection.
title: When Top-1 Fails: Calibrating LoRA Monitors for Masked Diffusion LMs
comment: 14 pages, 3 figures. Code and result artifacts: this https URL
title_translated: 当Top-1失效时：针对掩码扩散语言模型的LoRA监控校准
summary_translated: 离散扩散语言模型（DLM）微调继承了去噪时间置信度监控器的低成本诊断特性，但其在参数高效微调（PEFT）训练中的意义尚未经过检验。我们测试了Top-1 argmax集中度作为崩溃预警信号的有效性。在来自三个DLM家族的816种LoRA/PEFT配置中，该预警信号对所有配置均触发，但日志记录显示在200步时实际崩溃数为0/816，精度为零。根本原因在于预平衡饱和：Top-1集中度在优化开始前已很高，且很快对最终训练稳定性变得不敏感。随后我们评估了最大LoRA梯度范数，这是一种基于参数侧的信号，通过采样梯度路由而非词元集中度。在合并的LLaDA家族独立测试集上，经训练优化的阈值可识别出最终损失排名前10%的配置，精度达0.68，F1为0.79，即使在较低置信度边界下也优于全正类的Top-1基线。自回归控制和跨家族阈值失败表明结果仅适用于短周期DLM-LoRA检查，而非通用崩溃检测器。建议工作流程：放弃Top-1作为PEFT警报，早期记录最大梯度，按DLM家族分别校准阈值后再进行路由检查。

summary: Algorithms have become central to scientific research in the era of artificial intelligence (AI). Although algorithm mentions in papers are often used to indicate popularity and influence, existing studies usually evaluate individual algorithms in isolation and pay limited attention to the collective influence formed through their interconnections. This study constructs large-scale algorithm co-occurrence networks in natural language processing (NLP) based on the full text of academic papers and investigates algorithm influence from a network perspective. Using deep learning models, we extract algorithm entities and build overall, cumulative, and annual co-occurrence networks. We analyze their structural characteristics and apply multiple centrality measures to assess the group influence of algorithms across the whole field and over time. The results show that algorithm networks display typical features of complex networks, with increasingly dense connections developing over approximately two decades. Classic, high-performing algorithms and those located at the intersections of different research periods tend to have high popularity, control, centrality, and balanced influence. When the influence of an algorithm declines, it usually loses its core network position first, followed by weaker associations with other algorithms. This study is the first large-scale analysis of algorithm co-occurrence networks. Covering more than four decades of academic publications, it provides a temporal and structural view of algorithm influence and offers a foundation for future research on networks linking algorithms, scholars, and tasks.
title: Exploring Academic Influence of Algorithms by Co-occurrence Network Based on Full-text of Academic Papers
title_translated: 基于全文共现网络探索算法在学术研究中的影响力
summary_translated: 在人工智能时代，算法已成为科学研究的核心。尽管论文中提及算法常被用作流行度和影响力的指标，但现有研究通常孤立地评估单个算法，较少关注其相互关联所形成的集体影响力。本研究基于学术论文全文构建了自然语言处理（NLP）领域的大型算法共现网络，并从网络视角探究算法影响力。利用深度学习模型提取算法实体，构建整体、累积及年度共现网络。分析其结构特征，并应用多种中心性度量评估算法在整个领域及随时间演进中的群体影响力。结果显示，算法网络表现出复杂网络的典型特征，连接密度在过去约二十年间持续增强。经典、高性能算法以及处于不同研究时期交汇点的算法通常具有高流行度、控制力、中心性和均衡影响力。当某算法影响力下降时，通常首先失去其核心网络地位，随后与其他算法的关联也逐渐减弱。本研究是首次大规模算法共现网络分析，覆盖超过四个十年的学术出版物，提供了算法影响力的时间与结构视图，为未来算法、学者与任务之间关联网络的研究奠定了基础。

summary: On-policy distillation (OPD) trains a student policy using teacher signals computed on trajectories sampled by the student itself. Recent work shows that sampled-token OPD can be fragile on long-horizon reasoning tasks and that local teacher-support matching is a simple and effective repair. This paper introduces blockwise policy-drift gating, a lightweight student-only old-current drift controller for OPD under rollout reuse. The method computes log-probability shifts between the behavior student and the current student on the sampled token path, aggregates these shifts over fixed blocks or spans, and uses the resulting detached, mean-normalized gates to reweight OPD position losses. It does not change teacher targets, teacher top-K supports, or the rollout policy. In a six-variant Qwen3 math reasoning benchmark with a uniform 200-step training budget for all trained variants, we use pass@8 as the primary problem-level solve-rate metric. Fixed 64-token block gating improves sampled-token OPD mean pass@8 from 0.4978 to 0.5160 across AIME24, AIME25, MATH500, and AMC23. On Teacher-TopK/LSM, Block64 gives the best four-benchmark mean pass@8 among trained students. The results identify local old-current policy drift as a practical control signal for reused OPD rollouts and motivate block-level gating as a simple default for improving solve-rate robustness.
title: Blockwise Policy-Drift Gating for On-Policy Distillation
title_translated: 基于分块策略漂移门控的在线策略蒸馏
summary_translated: 在线策略蒸馏（OPD）使用学生模型自身采样轨迹上的教师信号来训练学生策略。近期研究表明，采样标记的OPD在长时程推理任务中可能表现脆弱，而局部教师支持匹配是一种简单有效的修复方法。本文提出一种轻量级的学生专用旧-当前策略漂移控制器——分块策略漂移门控，用于重用回溯轨迹下的OPD。该方法计算行为学生与当前学生在采样标记路径上的对数概率变化，将这些变化按固定块或跨度聚合，并利用得到的解耦、均值归一化门控重新加权OPD位置损失。该方法不改变教师目标、教师Top-K支持或回溯策略。在包含六个变体的Qwen3数学推理基准测试中，所有训练变体采用统一的200步训练预算，以pass@8作为主要问题级求解率指标。固定64标记块门控使采样标记OPD在AIME24、AIME25、MATH500和AMC23上的平均pass@8从0.4978提升至0.5160。在Teacher-TopK/LSM设置下，Block64在所有训练学生中取得了四个基准测试的最高平均pass@8。结果表明，局部旧-当前策略漂移是重用OPD回溯轨迹的一个实用控制信号，并推动分块门控作为一种简单默认策略以提升求解率鲁棒性。

summary: Speaker recognition has advanced rapidly with large-scale training datasets, yet Vietnamese remains under-resourced, with existing corpora limited in scale and acoustic diversity. Most large-scale datasets rely on facial cues to link speech with speaker identities, restricting data collection to recordings where speakers appear on camera. We propose a face-independent dataset construction pipeline and introduce VieSpeaker, a large-scale Vietnamese speaker recognition dataset. Our approach leverages textual metadata and large language model reasoning to infer speaker identities from transcripts and contextual information. VieSpeaker contains approximately 902 hours of speech from 4,715 speakers. Experiments show that models trained on VieSpeaker achieve improved robustness and generalization compared to existing Vietnamese datasets. This work demonstrates the feasibility of face-independent dataset construction and provides a new direction for building large-scale speech resources.
title: VieSpeaker: A Large-Scale Vietnamese Speaker Recognition Dataset Beyond Visual Dependency
comment: 5 pages, 1 figure, 6 tables, Accepted at Interspeech 2026
title_translated: VieSpeaker：超越视觉依赖的大规模越南语说话人识别数据集
summary_translated: 说话人识别技术随着大规模训练数据集的发展迅速进步，但越南语仍属于资源匮乏的语言，现有语料库在规模和声学多样性方面均有限。大多数大规模数据集依赖面部线索将语音与说话人身份关联，限制了数据收集仅限于有摄像头拍摄的录音。本文提出一种无需人脸信息的数据集构建流程，并引入VieSpeaker——一个大规模越南语说话人识别数据集。我们的方法利用文本元数据和大语言模型推理，从转录文本和上下文信息中推断说话人身份。VieSpeaker包含约902小时来自4,715名说话人的语音。实验表明，基于VieSpeaker训练的模型相比现有越南语数据集表现出更强的鲁棒性和泛化能力。本工作展示了无脸依赖数据集构建的可行性，并为构建大规模语音资源提供了新方向。

summary: Existing low-bit KV-cache quantizers often treat each cached key as a flat vector. Under RoPE, however, a key's contribution to a future attention logit decomposes into a position-dependent sum over two-dimensional frequency blocks. This makes key-cache quantization a block-wise bit-allocation problem: high-energy RoPE blocks are more sensitive to quantization error and should receive more bits. We introduce Block-GTQ, a RoPE-aware bit allocator for key-cache quantization built on TurboQuant-MSE(TQ-MSE). For each layer and KV head, Block-GTQ computes a label-free energy score for each RoPE block and greedily allocates integer bit widths by marginal gain. Under matched K/V bit budgets, Block-GTQ better preserves RoPE query-key logits on a ten-model diagnostic panel, cutting per-layer MAE by 32-80% at 2 and 3 b/dim K-only quantization and winning all 367/367 layer comparisons against uniform TQ-MSE. These fidelity gains translate to stronger downstream long-context retrieval, understanding, and reasoning. At K2V2 on Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct, Block-GTQ raises the six-task NIAH average from 70.6 to 97.4, and the LongBench-EN average from 36.87 to 53.31. On AIME 2024/2025 with DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B, without an fp16 recent-key buffer, Block-GTQ at K3V2 scores 51.7/37.5, close to fp16's 54.2/37.9, whereas uniform TQ-MSE collapses to 0.0/0.0. We further implement a packed-cache serving path. On a single H800 GPU with Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct, packed K3V3 achieves 3.24x KV-cache compression with fp16-comparable quality, runs 1.34x faster than fp16 FlashAttention2 at 128K context, reduces peak memory from 56.31 GB to 19.85 GB, and remains feasible at 256K and 512K where fp16 OOMs. Code is available at https://github.com/JIA-Lab-research/blockgtq.
title: RoPE-Aware Bit Allocation for KV-Cache Quantization

title_translated: 面向KV缓存量化中的RoPE感知比特分配
summary_translated: 现有的低比特KV缓存量化器通常将每个缓存键视为扁平向量。然而，在RoPE机制下，一个键对未来注意力logit的贡献可分解为二维频率块的位置相关求和。这使得键缓存量化成为一个分块比特分配问题：高能量RoPE块对量化误差更敏感，应分配更多比特。我们提出了Block-GTQ，一种基于TurboQuant-MSE（TQ-MSE）构建的RoPE感知键缓存比特分配器。对于每一层和KV头，Block-GTQ为每个RoPE块计算无标签的能量评分，并通过边际增益贪婪地分配整数比特宽度。在匹配的K/V比特预算下，Block-GTQ在十模型诊断面板上更好地保持了RoPE查询-键logits，相较于均匀TQ-MSE，在2和3 b/dim仅K量化时每层MAE降低32%-80%，并在全部367/367层比较中胜出。这些保真度提升转化为更强的下游长上下文检索、理解与推理能力。在Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct的K2V2设置下，Block-GTQ将六任务NIAH平均得分从70.6提升至97.4，LongBench-EN平均得分从36.87提升至53.31。在AIME 2024/2025测试中，使用DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B且无fp16最近键缓冲区的情况下，Block-GTQ在K3V2下得分为51.7/37.5，接近fp16的54.2/37.9，而均匀TQ-MSE则崩溃至0.0/0.0。我们进一步实现了压缩缓存服务路径。在单个H800 GPU上，使用Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct，压缩后的K3V3实现3.24倍KV缓存压缩，质量媲美fp16，运行速度比fp16 FlashAttention2快1.34倍（128K上下文），峰值内存从56.31 GB降至19.85 GB，并在256K和512K上下文中仍可行，而fp16在此处会内存溢出。代码已公开于https://github.com/JIA-Lab-research/blockgtq。

summary: As AI systems are deployed across increasingly diverse and high-stakes settings, model alignment must generalize beyond the tasks and domains seen during training. This is especially important for reinforcement learning (RL), which can introduce unexpected misalignment through reward hacking, deception, or other unintended strategies. We study whether RL on beneficial behavior, instantiated in realistic domains, can produce broad and persistent alignment generalization beyond the training distribution. We construct a dataset of realistic situations designed to measure and train beneficial traits, such as truthfulness, fairness, risk awareness, and corrigibility, spanning varied domains, including health, science, and education. We then train models with RL on this dataset and evaluate them on more than 50 independent benchmarks of alignment and beneficial behavior. Compared to a compute-matched baseline, beneficial trait RL improves performance on over 80% of these out-of-distribution benchmarks. We observe substantial out-of-distribution alignment transfer: a beneficial-behavior RL intervention entirely limited to one domain, health, produces broad improvements on non-health alignment evaluations, including reduced reward hacking, deception, and general misalignment. Finally, we study alignment persistence: whether behavior remains robustly aligned under attempts to steer models towards misalignment. Models trained with beneficial trait RL show improved persistence, including greater resistance to adversarial prompting and harmful finetuning; further work is required to isolate the sources of these effects. These results suggest that RL to reinforce beneficial behavior in realistic domains can produce models that are more robustly aligned with human flourishing.
title: Reinforcement Learning Towards Broadly and Persistently Beneficial Models
title_translated: 通向广泛且持久有益模型的强化学习
summary_translated: 随着AI系统被部署于日益多样化且高风险的场景中，模型对齐必须超越训练过程中所见的任务与领域。这一点在强化学习（RL）中尤为重要，因为其可能通过奖励黑客、欺骗或其他非预期策略引入意外对齐偏差。我们研究在现实领域中以有益行为为实例的强化学习，是否能产生超越训练分布的广泛且持久的对齐泛化。我们构建了一个涵盖健康、科学、教育等多样领域的现实情境数据集，用于测量和训练诸如诚实性、公平性、风险意识和可纠正性等有益特质。随后，我们在该数据集上训练模型，并在超过50个独立的对齐与有益行为基准上进行评估。与计算量匹配的基线相比，有益特质强化学习在超过80%的分布外基准上表现更优。我们观察到显著的分布外对齐迁移：一个仅限于健康领域的有益行为RL干预，便能在非健康领域的对齐评估中带来广泛改进，包括减少奖励黑客、欺骗和一般性对齐偏差。最后，我们研究对齐持久性：模型在试图引导其偏离对齐的行为下是否仍保持稳健对齐。经过有益特质RL训练的模型展现出更好的持久性，包括更强的抗对抗提示和有害微调能力；但进一步工作仍需揭示这些效应的来源。这些结果表明，在现实领域中通过强化学习促进有益行为，能够生成更稳健地契合人类福祉的模型。

summary: Driving VLA models incorporating Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning are attractive because they leverage pretrained VLM representations and expose intermediate decisions in natural language, yet current rationales often lack the step-by-step decision semantics needed to keep the rationale causally connected to the planned motion. We introduce Neuro-Symbolic Drive, a neuro-symbolic driving framework that supervises a driving VLA with rule-grounded reasoning traces extracted directly from classical rule-based planners. Our key observation is that rule-based planners are symbolic AI systems that already function as executable reasoning engines: they reason about active safety constraints, search over candidate maneuvers, and select a final trajectory. We instrument these planners in simulation to capture both the executed trajectory and the internal decision trace at each rule-evaluation step. Each trace is serialized into structured rule-grounded reasoning and paired with the trajectory to fine-tune Qwen3.5-4B as a driving VLA. Because these traces are derived directly from the planner states that determine the action, they ensure reasoning is structurally coupled to motion generation by construction, rather than by post-hoc alignment. On our simulator-generated benchmark, detailed rule-grounded reasoning reduces ADE@3s from 0.47 to 0.26 and miss rate from 8.30% to 6.40% under three-camera perception, and from 0.54 to 0.26 and 10.13% to 5.99% under eight-camera perception. Neuro-Symbolic Drive thus converts neuro-symbolic planning logic into structured supervision. Code base: https://github.com/XiangboGaoBarry/Neural-Symbolic-Drive.
title: Neuro-Symbolic Drive: Rule-Grounded Faithful Reasoning for Driving VLAs
title_translated: 神经符号驱动：规则基础的忠实推理用于驾驶视觉语言模型
summary_translated: 融合思维链（CoT）推理的驾驶视觉语言模型（VLA）因其利用预训练视觉语言模型表示并以自然语言暴露中间决策而具有吸引力，但当前的推理过程往往缺乏实现推理与规划动作之间因果关联所需的逐步决策语义。我们提出神经符号驱动框架，通过直接从经典规则基础规划器中提取的规则基础推理轨迹来监督驾驶VLA。我们的关键观察是，规则基础规划器本身就是可执行的符号推理引擎：它们推理主动安全约束、搜索候选操作并选择最终轨迹。我们在仿真中对这些规划器进行改造，以同时捕获执行轨迹和每个规则评估步骤的内部决策轨迹。每个轨迹被序列化为结构化的规则基础推理，并与轨迹配对，用于微调Qwen3.5-4B作为驾驶VLA。由于这些轨迹直接源自决定动作的规划器状态，因此推理在结构上与运动生成相耦合，而非通过事后对齐实现。在我们仿真生成的基准测试中，详细的规则基础推理将三摄像头感知下的ADE@3s从0.47降至0.26，漏检率从8.30%降至6.40%；在八摄像头感知下，分别从0.54降至0.26，漏检率从10.13%降至5.99%。因此，神经符号驱动将神经符号规划逻辑转化为结构化监督。代码库：https://github.com/XiangboGaoBarry/Neural-Symbolic-Drive。

summary: Representation alignment has emerged as an effective approach to improve Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) by regularizing their internal representations toward those of an external vision encoder. However, existing methods typically align a fixed layer of the language backbone, overlooking the fine-grained structure of Transformer models. In this work, we propose Head-Wise Representation Alignment (HeRA), a method that enforces cross-modal alignment at the level of individual attention heads. Our approach is grounded in the Platonic Representation Hypothesis, focusing on preserving the topological structure of representations (i.e., their local neighborhood relationships) across modalities. Following the Mutual K-Nearest Neighbor (MKNN) alignment metric, we introduce a contrastive objective that acts as a differentiable proxy for matching local structures. HeRA applies this objective during multimodal training to specific attention heads in the LLM, selected by their alignment score according to the MKNN metric. Counterintuitively, we find that aligning the least aligned heads yields the largest gains. Extensive evaluations across multiple MLLMs and 18 benchmarks demonstrate that HeRA consistently improves performance on challenging vision-centric tasks and serves as an effective regularizer against visual hallucinations by naturally curbing the over-reliance on linguistic priors. Our code is publicly released.
title: Mind the Heads: Topological Representation Alignment for Multimodal LLMs
title_translated: 关注注意力头：多模态大语言模型的拓扑表示对齐
summary_translated: 表示对齐已成为通过将多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）的内部表示正则化到外部视觉编码器表示来提升性能的有效方法。然而，现有方法通常仅对语言主干的固定层进行对齐，忽略了Transformer模型的细粒度结构。本文提出了一种头级表示对齐（HeRA）方法，该方法在单个注意力头层面强制实现跨模态对齐。我们的方法基于柏拉图表示假说，专注于保持不同模态间表示的拓扑结构（即局部邻域关系）。基于互K近邻（MKNN）对齐度量，我们引入了一种对比目标，作为匹配局部结构的可微代理。HeRA在多模态训练过程中，针对根据MKNN度量选择的特定注意力头应用此目标。出人意料的是，我们发现对对齐程度最低的头进行对齐能带来最大的性能提升。在多个MLLM和18个基准上的广泛评估表明，HeRA在挑战性的以视觉为中心的任务中持续提升性能，并通过自然抑制对语言先验的过度依赖，有效缓解视觉幻觉问题。代码已公开发布。

summary: PLCverif is the most mature open-source platform for PLC formal verification, developed at CERN and in production use since 2019. Yet it has two fundamental limitations: no support for Ladder Diagram (LD) programs, the dominant PLC notation, and reliance on CBMC as its primary backend, which restricts verification to bounded proofs. The PLCverif authors themselves identified ESBMC as the appropriate backend improvement. Prior work established ESBMC-PLC (a textual LD frontend with k-induction) and ESBMC-GraphPLC (graphical PLCopen XML support); together, they cover LD with unbounded proofs but not Structured Text (ST), and graphical LD with timer/counter function blocks remains unverifiable. This paper presents ESBMC-PLC+, a unified framework that closes both gaps: (1) an ST/SCL frontend via the MATIEC IEC 61131-3 compiler, routing C-compiled ST to ESBMC with nondeterministic input modeling and YAML property injection; (2) function block state semantics for graphical LD, extending the DFS resolver to model TON/TOF/TP timers, CTU/CTD counters, and R_TRIG/F_TRIG edge triggers as persistent scan-cycle state variables in the GOTO IR. ESBMC-PLC+ is the first open-source PLC verification framework to support all three major IEC 61131-3 input formats via a single ESBMC backend, enabling k-induction-unbounded safety proofs. A feature comparison with PLCverif and experimental evaluation on 8 benchmark programs, including programs with up to 8 integer timers, shows that ESBMC-PLC+ matches PLCverif's input coverage while providing stronger guarantees. Against nuXmv's BDD backend, ESBMC-PLC+ is 400-2,000x faster on timer programs and completes proofs where nuXmv BDD times out at 120s.
title: ESBMC-PLC+: A Unified IEC~61131-3 Formal Verification Framework as a PLCverif Successor
title_translated: ESBMC-PLC+：作为PLCverif继承者的统一IEC 61131-3形式化验证框架
summary_translated: PLCverif是CERN开发的最成熟的开源PLC形式化验证平台，自2019年起投入生产使用。然而，它存在两个根本性局限：不支持主流的梯形图（LD）程序，且依赖CBMC作为主要后端，限制了验证范围为有界证明。PLCverif作者自身也指出ESBMC是合适的后端改进方向。先前工作建立了ESBMC-PLC（文本式LD前端，支持k-归纳）和ESBMC-GraphPLC（图形化PLCopen XML支持），二者共同覆盖了无界证明下的LD，但未涵盖结构化文本（ST），且图形化LD中的定时器/计数器功能块仍无法验证。本文提出ESBMC-PLC+，一个统一框架，填补了这两项空白：（1）通过MATIEC IEC 61131-3编译器提供ST/SCL前端，将C编译后的ST路由至ESBMC，采用非确定性输入建模和YAML属性注入；（2）为图形化LD提供功能块状态语义，扩展DFS解析器，将TON/TOF/TP定时器、CTU/CTD计数器以及R_TRIG/F_TRIG边沿触发器建模为GOTO IR中的持久扫描周期状态变量。ESBMC-PLC+是首个通过单一ESBMC后端支持IEC 61131-3三种主要输入格式的开源PLC验证框架，实现了无界k-归纳安全证明。与PLCverif的功能对比及在8个基准程序（包括最多含8个整数定时器的程序）上的实验评估显示，ESBMC-PLC+在输入覆盖上与PLCverif相当，同时提供更强的保证。相较于nuXmv的BDD后端，ESBMC-PLC+在定时器程序上快400至2000倍，并能在nuXmv BDD在120秒超时的情况下完成证明。

summary: Graph and multi-agent orchestration frameworks make production large language model (LLM) workflows practical, but they do not by themselves solve conversational continuity when users maintain several interdependent objectives. This conceptual systems paper focuses on the high-complexity end of that design space, where goals can be suspended, resumed, revised, and invalidated by actions in other goals. We introduce the Goal-Oriented Dialogue Runtime (GODR), a framework-neutral design pattern that treats goals, task frames, lifecycle state, invalidation rules, and resumption contracts as first-class runtime objects while delegating bounded execution to graph runtimes, agents, tools, or application programming interfaces (APIs). GODR is not proposed as a replacement for workflow graphs in simple guided processes; it is intended for complex, multi-domain, interruptible conversations where objective continuity cannot be recovered reliably from agent identity, chat history, or execution-graph position alone. The paper formalizes the problem, proposes runtime objects and architecture-selection criteria, and frames evaluation as an agenda for future empirical validation rather than as a measured performance claim.
title: From Task-Guided Conversational Graphs to Goal-Oriented Dialogue Runtimes
title_translated: 从任务引导的对话图到面向目标的对话运行时
summary_translated: 图结构与多智能体编排框架使大型语言模型（LLM）的工作流在生产环境中变得可行，但它们本身并不能解决用户拥有多个相互依赖目标时的对话连续性问题。本文是一篇概念性系统论文，聚焦于该设计空间的高复杂度端，其中目标可能因其他目标中的操作而被暂停、恢复、修改或作废。我们提出了面向目标的对话运行时（GODR），一种与框架无关的设计模式，将目标、任务框架、生命周期状态、作废规则和恢复契约视为一等运行时对象，同时将有限执行委托给图运行时、智能体、工具或应用程序接口（API）。GODR并非用于简单引导流程中替代工作流图，而是专为复杂、跨领域、可中断的对话设计，其中目标连续性无法仅通过智能体身份、聊天历史或执行图位置可靠恢复。本文形式化了该问题，提出了运行时对象与架构选择标准，并将评估定位为未来实证验证的议程，而非量化性能声明。

summary: Large language models are increasingly used to answer questions over annual reports, earnings decks, and analyst notes, yet their outputs remain difficult to verify in high-stakes financial workflows. A fluent answer can blend directly grounded statements, weak synthesis, and unsupported claims across narrative text, tables, and charts. We present EvidenceLens, a visual analytics prototype that treats financial question answering as a claim-evidence alignment problem. The system decomposes an answer into atomic claims, summarizes support composition and confidence, support gaps, and coordinates claim-level inspection with source passages, table cells, and chart regions. Its core visual representation is a multimodal claim-evidence matrix that makes coverage, contradiction, and modality imbalance immediately visible. To support reproducibility, we also specify a JSON-based artifact schema, a lightweight multimodal alignment pipeline, and a deterministic review-priority ranking that maps backend signals into an auditable visual structure. Through representative report-auditing scenarios, we show how EvidenceLens helps analysts distinguish grounded claims from overconfident synthesis that conventional chat interfaces flatten.
title: EvidenceLens: A Claim-Evidence Matrix for Auditing Financial Question Answering
title_translated: EvidenceLens：用于审计金融问答的主张-证据矩阵
summary_translated: 大型语言模型越来越多地被用于回答年度报告、财报演示文稿和分析师笔记中的问题，但其输出在高风险金融工作流中仍难以验证。流畅的回答可能混合了直接有据的陈述、弱合成内容以及缺乏支持的主张，这些内容分布在叙述文本、表格和图表中。我们提出了EvidenceLens，一个可视化分析原型，将金融问答视为主张-证据对齐问题。该系统将答案分解为原子主张，总结支持构成、置信度、支持缺口，并协调主张级别的检查与源段落、表格单元格和图表区域。其核心可视化表示是一个多模态主张-证据矩阵，能够立即揭示覆盖范围、矛盾和模态不平衡。为支持可复现性，我们还定义了一个基于JSON的构件模式、轻量级多模态对齐流水线，以及一个确定性的评审优先级排序机制，将后端信号映射为可审计的可视化结构。通过代表性报告审计场景，我们展示了EvidenceLens如何帮助分析师区分有依据的主张与传统聊天界面所掩盖的过度自信合成内容。
